visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a brightly lit retail aisle packed with instant noodle displays. One woman wears a black multi-tiered dress with long sleeves, while the other wears a light blue dress and a grey bucket hat. They pose playfully amidst oversized Cup Noodle decorations and shelves overflowing with packaged ramen under warm artificial lights. (2) The woman in the bucket hat holds a large white bag shaped exactly like a classic Cup Noodle container. She turns it around to show the graphic "Cup Noodle" logo and images of ingredients on the front. The camera follows her movement as she presents the unique backpack to the viewer in the crowded store environment. (3) A close-up shot shows a hand unzipping the top of the giant Cup Noodle backpack. Inside, several smaller, standard-sized cups of Nissin ramen are visible, packed tightly together. The lighting focuses on the white insulated interior and the colorful lids of the various ramen flavors nestled within. (4) One of the women picks up a specific cup from the bag, showing the "Rich Chicken Soup Flavor" label to the camera. She then shows another purple-labeled cup. The camera stays in a close-up framing, highlighting the product packaging and the sheer quantity of items held inside the novelty container. (5) The camera captures a wide-angle shot of a tower of Cup Noodle products stacked on a shelf in front of the giant backpack. The backpack is now hung up as part of the display. Various flavors like seafood and original are visible in the stack, creating a dense visual of branded merchandise in the shop.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male narration begins immediately, delivered at a rapid speech rate with high pitch variability. The voice is enthusiastic and projected. In the background, an upbeat J-pop theme song with a strong 4/4 electronic beat and bright synthesizer textures plays at a moderate volume. (2) A sharp "whoosh" sound effect marks a transition as the narrator highlights a large character figure. The narration becomes more animated, with rising intonation patterns. The background music remains continuous, maintaining a fast tempo of approximately 128 BPM with persistent percussion and melodic loops. (3) The vocal intensity drops slightly as the narrator describes a sleeping doll, adopting a warmer, more sentimental tone. The music continues but feels less dominant. There is no noticeable background noise, indicating a high-quality studio recording or heavily processed voiceover track with clear enunciation. (4) A digital "ding" sound effect triggers a new phase as the narrator asks a rhetorical question. The voice carries a playful, teasing quality. The music swells in volume, featuring catchy melodic hooks played on synthesizers that mirror the high-arousal energy of the speech. (5) The narration shifts to a more informative, persuasive style while reviewing merchandise. Speech density remains high, with few pauses. Occasional "pop" sound effects accompany the visual presentation of different items, while the background music loops with consistent tonal clarity and low harmonic tension.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand centered in a brightly lit toy or hobby retail store. The woman on the left has long, straight dark hair and is wearing a dark, tiered sleeveless dress with a pearl necklace. The woman on the right wears a vibrant blue long-sleeved sweater, a white lace-trimmed vest over it, and a dark blue beret. They are both gesticulating with their hands while looking directly at the camera with wide, expressive smiles. The background is filled with shelves and walls covered in small, colorful boxes and posters of various collectible toys. (2) The camera cuts to a slightly closer shot focusing on a white board or poster detailing a lottery game. It features colorful images of "Mega Space Molly" figures dressed as Sanrio characters. The women use their fingers to point at specific winning numbers listed on the poster: 10, 25, 68, 75, 90, and 99. Their facial expressions are animated, with raised eyebrows and open mouths. Bright yellow and pink text overlays appear at the top and bottom of the frame, partially obscuring the background. (3) The scene shifts to a close-up of a scratch-off or pull-tab grid consisting of many small grey circles. A hand, holding a gold binder clip, pulls back a white tab to reveal the number "20" printed in black on a white background. As the number is revealed, a comic-style "!!!" graphic with a yellow jagged border appears on screen. The women are then shown again, reacting with intense excitement, raising their fists in the air and displaying high-energy body language. (4) The women stand together, smiling broadly. The woman on the right holds a large, rectangular box with a yellow and pink design. The box is clearly labeled "Mega Space Molly" and "Sanrio Characters," showing various character illustrations like Hello Kitty, Kuromi, and Cinnamoroll. They lean towards each other and then the woman on the right moves the box closer to the camera, showcasing the product clearly. The lighting remains bright and even, highlighting the colorful packaging and the joyful expressions of the two individuals.

The background shows various pallets of products and people walking in the distance. (3) The camera focuses on a white price tag hanging from the ceiling, displaying the text '$175'. The lighting is bright and consistent with a supermarket setting. (4) The woman returns to the frame, continuing to talk and move the bag of sweet potatoes. She is positioned in the center of the aisle with tall shelving units filled with boxed produce like pumpkins and potatoes behind her. Yellow and pink text boxes appear as overlays at the bottom. (5) A montage begins showing a kitchen sink where the sweet potatoes are being washed under a stream of water. (6) Several sweet potatoes are shown individually wrapped in silver aluminum foil and placed on a white ceramic plate and a metal wire rack. (7) The foil-wrapped potatoes are placed into a white, vintage-style oven with silver knobs. The oven light is on, illuminating the interior. (8) A close-up shows the oven's temperature and timer knobs being adjusted. (9) The final scene shows a baked sweet potato cut in half on a green plate, revealing a vibrant, steaming yellow-orange interior. The setting is a clean kitchen countertop with a wooden slatted background.

The background shows tall warehouse shelves stocked with bulk items and a few distant shoppers. Lighting is bright and even. (2) The women rotate the pillows to show the side and back. The woman on the left points to the green fabric on the side of her 'Eight Million' pillow. They smile and look at the camera, then at each other. A person in a grey hoodie walks by in the background. (3) The women bring the pillows close together and look directly at the camera with joyful expressions. The text overlays continue to appear, emphasizing the price and the product. The environment remains a busy retail warehouse with visible store aisles.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a busy background of plush toys in a warehouse. A large Costco Wholesale logo is centered at the top. Below it, stylized yellow text with a black outline reads "好市多" (Costco). An animated character head resembling Wreck-It Ralph appears on the left with a surprised expression. Text at the bottom indicates a weekly discount report for February 3rd to February 9th. (2) The scene shifts to a series of rapid product showcases. First, Sanrio 18-inch plush toys are shown in a pile; text overlays the screen showing a price drop from 789 to 599. The camera is static, focusing on the products on shelves or in bins within a brightly lit warehouse setting. (3) The sequence continues with Kleenex tissue boxes stacked high on pallets. Yellow text identifies the item as three-layer tissues with a discount from 419 to 335. The background shows typical industrial shelving and concrete floors of a wholesale store. (4) Multiple food items follow in quick succession: Nestle Koko Krunch cereal boxes, Glico Bisco cookies in red boxes, and stacks of Pringles cans. Each product is centered in the frame with clear text overlays detailing the brand name, discount amount, and final promotional price. (5) Household and tech items are introduced, including Philips Sonicare toothbrushes and Soodatek charging cables. The lighting is consistently bright and even, characteristic of a large retail environment. (6) Fresh produce and frozen foods are shown: mesh bags of sweet potatoes, boxes of pears, and cartons of Binggrae milk. The video concludes with high-end health supplements like DHA fish oil and chicken essence, maintaining the same fast-paced editing and text-heavy presentation style.

(7) The final shot displays cooked steak slices served on a black cast-iron griddle with grilled bell peppers, presented alongside fresh lettuce and dipping ingredients.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a toy store aisle filled with colorful boxes. The woman on the right wears a navy beret and blue sweater, holding a green and gold toy box. The woman on the left wears a black top and a pearl necklace. Yellow and black text overlays appear at the top and bottom. (2) The camera zooms slightly as the two women talk, gesturing towards the box. The background shows shelves packed with various collectible toy boxes and gift items under bright indoor lighting. (3) The women each hold a box and begin to peel off the top cardboard. The woman in the black top looks down at her box as she tears it open. The woman in blue smiles at the camera. (4) The woman in black pulls out a green plush toy encased in a clear plastic shell. She holds it up to the camera, showing a pink pig face with a green hood. (5) The woman in the blue sweater suddenly produces another toy in a plastic shell, appearing highly excited with an open-mouthed expression. She holds up a dark blue/grey fuzzy plush toy. (6) Both women pose together, each holding their respective plushies. The woman in blue holds the rare blue plush toy close to her face, smiling broadly as the video ends.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit pet supply warehouse. Two women are the main focus; the one on the right wears a black knit top and a fluffy grey-and-black hat, while the one on the left has long dark hair and wears a brown dress under a black cardigan, holding a small white fluffy dog. They stand in front of large bags of pet food with a bright red 'Buy 1 Get 1 Free' sign hanging above. (2) The scene shifts through rapid cuts as the women demonstrate various pet products. They hold up circular cat scratching boards with panda designs, point excitedly at a tall wooden cat tree, and pose next to stacks of 'Ever Clean' cat litter. Their expressions are consistently joyful and energetic, with wide smiles and frequent hand gestures toward the products. (3) Transitioning to smaller consumables, they showcase pet wet wipes, pulling a piece out to show the texture, and hold up pink and blue packages of pet training pads. The background remains a dense retail environment with high metal shelving units packed with diverse pet products. (4) The hosts move to the food section, displaying canned food, bags of jerky, and festive red gift boxes decorated with cartoon animals. Lighting is consistently bright studio-style indoor light, highlighting the colorful packaging of the products. (5) In the final phase, they present pet supplements and health-monitoring litter. One woman holds a blue box of 'Hematuria Detection' litter. The video concludes with a close-up of the small white dog sitting in a pet stroller, with several polaroid photos of pets fanned out in front of the camera.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-paced male narrator speaking in Mandarin, introducing the 'Costco Weekly Specials'. The background music is a bright, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. (2) As each product appears on screen, the narrator rapidly lists the product name, original price, and discounted sale price. The vocal delivery is sharp and enthusiastic, with a rising intonation at the end of many sentences to maintain excitement. (3) Subtle 'pop' and 'ding' sound effects are interspersed precisely at the moment price figures appear on screen, enhancing the information delivery. (4) The narrator maintains this high speech rate and arousal level throughout the entire 87 seconds, with almost no silences. The background music remains constant in volume and tempo, providing a high-energy rhythmic bed for the narration. (5) The mix is clean with the vocal positioned clearly above the background music, indicating professional studio-level post-production.

The high-energy audio and fast visual pace are designed to grab attention and convey a sense of 'don't-miss' urgency for these time-limited deals.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a large warehouse-style store with high ceilings and industrial shelving. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black translucent top, holds a plastic mesh bag filled with red pears. She speaks directly to the camera with an expressive face, using her hands to emphasize her points while standing in front of stacked boxes of produce. (2) The camera cuts briefly to a price display sign indicating 'U.S. RED ANJOU PEAR' for $130, then returns to the woman. She continues to handle the bag of pears, showing them from different angles. Other shoppers and a yellow forklift-like cart are visible in the blurred background under bright, cold warehouse lighting. (3) A new phase begins as a different young woman appears, wearing a purple cardigan and a grey-and-black patterned furry hat. She is in the same warehouse environment, holding the pears close to her face and sniffing them with a delighted expression. A hand enters the frame from the right holding a box of 'KOREAN MANDARINS' toward her. (4) The setting shifts to a domestic indoor environment with warm, soft lighting. Two women sit at a table; a wooden cutting board with sliced fruit pieces rests between them. They gesture toward the fruit and the camera while conversing. (5) The final shot is a close-up of a decorative glass with a gold bow on the stem, containing a dark red liquid and chunks of fruit, held against a soft-focus background.

She is smiling broadly and pointing enthusiastically at frozen bags of 'Gnocchi Four Cheese' displayed behind glass doors. The lighting is bright and industrial. (2) She opens the freezer door, reaches inside, and pulls out a large white bag of the gnocchi. She turns the bag around to show the product details and packaging design. The camera zooms in to provide a clear view of the Italian-style dumplings. (3) The scene shifts to a bright, modern kitchen setting where the woman sits at a table with another female. She holds up the large bag and then shows smaller individual portions inside. Close-up footage shows the gnocchi simmering in a white creamy sauce within a metal pot. (4) Both women are now seen eating the cooked gnocchi from blue bowls using chopsticks. They have highly expressive, joyful facial expressions, nodding and giving thumbs up to the camera. The background shows a clean, well-lit domestic interior with warm lighting.

(2) Close-up shots alternate between her face and the box of tomatoes. She pulls a single tomato out to compare its size to her thumb, emphasizing its large scale against her hand. Background shows other shoppers and shelves. (3) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor living room. The woman is now wearing a black beret and a white top with ruffles. She holds the same box of tomatoes and continues her presentation with high energy. (4) A series of close-up shots show her at a table wearing transparent plastic gloves. She uses pink scissors to cut dark, dried fruit into small pieces, then uses a knife to carefully slit a large red cherry tomato along its side on a white cutting board. (5) She demonstrates stuffing the cut fruit into the tomato slit. The final phase shows a heart-shaped pink plate filled with the prepared stuffed tomatoes. She picks one up, eats it, and closes her eyes with a delighted expression.

She examines it closely, looking down at the labels while talking to the camera. In the blurred background, several shopping carts and other customers can be seen moving through the aisles. The metal wire racks are mostly empty, suggesting high demand or low stock. A white price card displays "$399/KG" for Australian beef. The camera pans slightly to show more empty space in the cooler. The overhead fluorescent lighting creates a sterile and bright environment typical of a large-scale retail warehouse. (4) The video transitions to an indoor kitchen setting with a warm yet bright atmosphere. A person wearing black protective gloves is seen from a top-down perspective, using a sharp silver knife to meticulously trim white connective tissue and excess fat from a large slab of raw red beef. The meat is placed on a thick wooden cutting board, with stainless steel bowls visible in the background. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the person holding a freshly sliced piece of steak. The marbling and texture of the beef are displayed in detail. The silver blade of a knife with the engraved brand logo "旬" is shown resting on the cutting board. (2) As the video cuts to various products, a distinct 'pop' sound effect is heard at every transition to emphasize the new item. The narrator speaks rapidly, listing each product's name and its discount amount in a cheerful, rhythmic manner that aligns with the fast visual cuts. (3) The interplay between the high-tempo music and the constant vocal delivery continues. The 'pop' SFX occurs frequently, approximately every two seconds, marking the presentation of meats, seafood, and snacks. No significant pauses occur in either the vocals or the music. (4) The narrator maintains a consistent, professional yet animated delivery through the end of the list. The music maintains its energetic BPM without fading. The overall mix is clean with the vocal track positioned prominently above the BGM and SFX layers, concluding with a final call to action.

The lighting is bright and industrial, characteristic of a large retail store. (2) The woman tosses the bean bag onto the wooden board; the camera pans to follow the movement as the bag slides toward the hole. In the background, aisles of merchandise and other shoppers are visible, including a person pushing a cart. (3) The woman looks directly at the camera with a surprised and excited expression, her mouth open and eyes wide. She gestures toward the game board as text overlays and colorful variety graphics appear around her. (4) The camera switches to a medium shot showing the woman talking and gesturing with her hands while standing near the product display. She touches her face and smiles frequently. She smiles warmly at a woman seated to her left who has long black hair and is wearing a lavender top. On the table are several white bowls, glasses of water, and a black paper cup. (2) The main character reaches into a small blue floral drawstring bag and pulls out a single white die and a black shaker cup. She begins counting a stack of 1000-unit currency notes, placing them on the black tablecloth. The lighting remains bright and consistent, emphasizing the textures of the fabric and the items on the table. (3) The camera pans slightly as a small white dog, a Maltese, appears resting near the woman in lavender. The main character demonstrates the dice game, shaking the black cup. Various text overlays in bold yellow and white appear at the top and bottom of the frame. (4) A man's hand enters the frame from the right, taking the black cup and rolling the die onto the table. The die lands on '2'. The main character picks up two currency notes and hands them to the off-screen person. (5) The woman in lavender then takes her turn, shaking the cup vigorously. The die rolls out and lands on '6'. She reacts with extreme joy, covering her face with her hands while the main character counts out six notes and hands them over. (6) A third person's hand enters to roll, resulting in a '3'. The main character hands over three notes. The video concludes with the main character gathering the remaining money and making a finger-heart gesture toward the camera with a satisfied smile.

The background is filled with tall industrial shelving units stacked with various products, notably blue boxes of bottled water. (2) The camera transitions to close-up shots of the plush toys. First, a bright yellow plush chicken with a red comb and large, shiny black eyes is shown. Next, a white plush cow with black patches and a smiling face is presented. Finally, a green textured alligator plush with a yellow underbelly and small black eyes is highlighted. The lighting remains bright and consistent, reflecting off the plush material's soft texture. (3) The scene shifts to a price tag on a shelf, showing "579" in large black numbers. The woman's hands are seen pointing at the tag and then touching the toys to demonstrate their softness and size relative to her palm. The editing includes fast cuts between the price tag and the woman's face, which shows expressions of excitement and approval as she speaks. (4) The woman holds the box closer to the camera, showcasing the brand name "KONG" on the packaging. She points to the back of the box, which has illustrations and information about the "squeaker" feature. The video ends with her holding all three plush toys together, smiling directly at the viewer in a medium shot, with the warehouse setting providing a deep background perspective.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand inside a large, brightly lit Costco retail warehouse. The woman on the left has long, straight dark hair and wears a lavender short-sleeved shirt; she is struggling to embrace a massive, bright green plush T-Rex dinosaur which takes up most of her torso. The woman on the right wears a dark blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, a textured grey bucket hat, and blue denim shorts. She gestures excitedly with both hands towards the plush, her face showing a wide smile and high energy as they stand in an aisle filled with pink plush toys in the background. (2) The camera remains static at eye-level. The woman in the bucket hat dominates the narration, pointing her finger upwards while speaking directly to the camera. Several cartoon-style 'wah' text bubbles in yellow and pink flicker around them on screen. A large, stylized text graphic saying 'Huge Hugging Dragon' in blue and yellow occupies the lower third of the frame. The lighting is bright and even, characteristic of a large commercial store environment, highlighting the vibrant green texture of the plush toy. (3) The woman in the blue top reaches for a green and white checkered blanket that was apparently attached to or inside the dinosaur plush. She unfolds the blanket to reveal a grid pattern where each square contains a dark green silhouette of characters from the 'Toy Story' movie franchise. She holds the blanket up close to the lens, moving it slightly to catch the light, showing off the soft fleece texture. The woman holding the dinosaur continues to support the heavy plush toy in the background, smiling as the focus shifts to the accessory. (4) The camera cuts to a tighter shot focusing on the head of the green dinosaur plush. Its eyes are large and black with a small white highlight, and its mouth is open in a classic 'Rex' expression with white felt teeth. The woman in the hat reaches in to squeeze the plush's soft body, demonstrating its squishiness. She then looks back at the camera, holding up one finger to give a final piece of advice or warning about the weight of the toy.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white crochet-style shrug over a dark brown dress, stands in the aisle of a warehouse supermarket. She is positioned next to a retail display showcasing large, grey Moai-head-shaped planters. The environment features bright, overhead industrial lighting and metal shelving units in the background. The woman smiles and gestures toward the products as she speaks, her hands moving dynamically to emphasize her points. (2) The scene shifts to a tighter framing of the Moai planters on the shelf. There are three distinct versions: one with a rough, grey stone-like texture, one with a smooth mint green finish, and another with a terracotta-colored surface. The woman’s hand, wearing a pink watch strap, is seen touching the textured grey planter to highlight its material details and size relative to her hand. (3) The woman picks up the mint green planter and turns it upside down to display its underside to the camera. She points her index finger at a circular drainage hole in the center of the base, demonstrating the functional aspect of the item. The background shows blurred warehouse shelves stacked with various boxes and household goods, characteristic of a large-scale retail store. (4) In the final segment, the woman returns to a medium shot, standing in front of the Moai display and engaging directly with the camera. She uses expressive hand gestures and facial expressions to deliver her concluding remarks. The store's department signage, specifically for the meat section, is visible in the upper background, and yellow text overlays appear briefly across the lower third of the frame.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white cardigan over a lace top and a pleated brown skirt, stands in a brightly lit retail environment. Behind her are glass-door freezers filled with frozen seafood packages. She holds a large red bag of Kirkland Signature Wild Argentine Red Shrimp, presenting it to the camera with a smiling, neutral expression. A prominent red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera moves to a close-up of the product bag. The woman places her hand flat against the clear plastic window of the packaging to provide a scale comparison for the size of the frozen shrimp. Yellow and blue graphic text overlays appear surrounding the bag to emphasize the size. (3) The shot returns to a medium framing of the woman as she continues to hold the bag and point at specific details on the label, such as the weight and price. She gestures with her free hand while speaking. The background remains the frozen food aisle of a large warehouse store with industrial shelving. (4) The scene transitions to a kitchen setting with warm lighting. A top-down shot shows a black frying pan on a gas stove. Several peeled, pinkish shrimp are being sautéed along with several whole garlic cloves. The pan is lifted and shaken, demonstrating the cooking process and the texture of the shrimp. A blue text bar appears at the top of the frame.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-paced male narrator introducing the Costco weekly special report. The narrator's pitch is energetic and varied, aimed at grabbing attention immediately. Accompanying the voice is a bright, upbeat electronic BGM with a steady 128 BPM 4/4 beat. (2) A distinctive digital 'pop' sound effect triggers as the narrator begins listing the first few products, Kleenex and beef. The vocal delivery is rapid, with almost no pauses between sentences. The background music maintains its steady rhythmic drive, providing a consistent energy floor. (3) Each transition between product categories is marked by a sharp, percussive SFX, similar to a bubble popping or a camera shutter. The narrator continues to shout out product names and prices with high emotional arousal. Ambient warehouse noise is virtually nonexistent, suggesting a professional studio voiceover track mixed with clear BGM. (4) As the video progresses through the snack and beverage sections, the narrator's tone remains consistently animated and positive. The BGM synthesizers pulse in the background, carefully leveled below the vocal track to ensure clarity. The sound effects density is high, with an effect occurring roughly every two seconds. (5) In the final half of the video, covering household goods and alcohol, the vocal rate remains at an extreme high, nearing five syllables per second. The BGM maintains its major-mode tonality, reinforcing a joyful shopping atmosphere. No audio distortion is present, indicating high-quality mastering. (6) The video concludes with the narrator emphasizing the final wine deals. The background music reaches its loop point or fades slightly as the narration finishes. The overall acoustic signature is bright and compressed, optimized for mobile device playback and social media consumption.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is designed to inform Costco members in Taiwan about current weekly discounts and promotional offers. By using high-speed editing, energetic narration, and clear pricing overlays, it aims to create a sense of urgency and excitement around the sales. The comprehensive intent is to drive foot traffic to the store during the specified dates.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video showcases specific products available at a retail store (Costco) with clear pricing and discount information, acting as a direct promotional tool for the retailer and the featured brands.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video effectively utilizes 'short-form' social media aesthetics, characterized by high informational density and rapid sensory stimuli. The synchronization between visual cuts, pricing text, and rhythmic narration makes it highly suitable for quick consumption.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She wears a striped sun hat, a black dress with lace detailing, and a black choker. She smiles broadly while holding two round plastic tubs of green cream cheese spread. Behind her, rows of shopping carts and refrigerated shelves filled with products are visible. (2) The scene transitions to a home interior. Two women are seated at a table. The woman from the previous scene, now wearing a dark beret, is on the right. Another woman with long dark hair in a black and white dress is on the left. They hold a tub of the same green spread and a plate of pasta, gesturing with forks while talking excitedly to the camera. (3) The women continue to eat the pasta, showing close-ups of the noodles coated in green sauce. The lighting is warm and domestic, with kitchen appliances and home decor blurred in the background as they enthusiastically recommend the product.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a fast-paced handheld walking shot entering a large warehouse store. A massive red and blue Costco Wholesale logo is centered at the top. Below it, large yellow and red stylized text overlays announce a weekly special report. A cartoon character is positioned on the left side of the frame. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a large retail space. (2) The scene quickly transitions into a rapid montage of various products on shelves. First, packages of raw beef ribs are shown in close-up, followed by stacks of sea salt durian ice cream boxes. Large white and red text overlays specify the original price, the discount amount, and the final sale price for each item. The camera focuses on the product labels and textures. (3) The montage continues displaying a wide array of goods including Kinder chocolates, tropical fruit candies, Airwaves gum, and protein drinks. Each product is presented with a quick pan or static close-up shot. The background consistently features tall warehouse racking and neighboring merchandise. Text overlays are consistently placed over the center or bottom of the screen. (4) Further products like laundry scent beads, Pocky sticks, and high-end spirits are showcased. The camera angles are mostly eye-level or slightly high, looking down at the products on the shelves. The editing is extremely fast, with each product visible for only a second or two. (5) The final segments show household appliances like a dehumidifier and chilled food items like dumplings and cheese. The video maintains a high-energy visual rhythm throughout, concluding with more snack items and health supplements before ending abruptly on a product shot.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track kicks off with an extremely high-energy, fast-paced male narration in Traditional Chinese. The voice is bright and enthusiastic, delivering product names and prices without hesitation. Simultaneously, an upbeat electronic dance track with a driving 4-on-the-floor beat starts. (2) Each visual cut to a new product is synchronized with a subtle 'pop' or 'bubble' sound effect, adding to the percussive feel of the edit. The narrator's pitch remains consistently high with frequent rising intonations to create a sense of excitement. (3) The background music remains constant throughout, providing a solid rhythmic backbone to the narration. The speech rate is near-continuous, with virtually no structural pauses between items. (4) Toward the middle and end of the clip, additional 'whoosh' transition sound effects are layered into the mix during major category shifts. The spectral balance is bright, emphasizing the clarity of the voice over the deep bass of the music.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women are positioned in the center of the frame within a brightly lit, modern indoor setting. The woman on the left, with long dark hair and wearing a black-and-white top, holds a clear plastic container of green pesto cream cheese toward the camera. The woman on the right, wearing a dark beret and a ruffled white top, holds a blue plate of pasta and uses a fork to lift a portion. A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlaid at the top. The background consists of a neutral-toned wall and a glimpse of a living area with warm accent lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up cooking demonstration in a kitchen. A hand pours clear olive oil into a grey non-stick frying pan resting on a black induction cooktop. Tongs are used to place cooked linguine into the shimmering oil. A black spatula adds a generous dollop of the thick, pale-green pesto mixture. Sliced purple onions are introduced and stirred into the pasta. A black ladle scoops starchy water from a nearby blue ceramic pot and pours it into the pan to emulsify the sauce. The pan is then lifted and tossed vigorously over the burner to coat the noodles evenly. (3) The camera returns to the two women in the original indoor setting. The woman in the beret takes a large, enthusiastic bite of the pesto pasta, her eyes widening and mouth opening wide to convey enjoyment. Her companion on the left gestures toward the camera while still holding the product tub. The lighting remains soft and consistent, highlighting their facial expressions and the texture of the food on the plate.

The middle segment features a clean, professional-looking kitchen with a black induction stove, grey countertops, and a blue Staub-style ceramic pot.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, high-arousal female narration accompanied by a bright, upbeat electronic pop track. A sharp 'whoosh' transition effect occurs within the first second to synchronize with the appearing text. The speaker's tone is very energetic and welcoming. (2) A light 'pop' or bubble-like sound effect triggers at the one-second mark. The BGM maintains a steady tempo as the vocal explains the properties of the pesto spread. The speech rate is rapid but clearly articulated with high pitch variability. (3) A dramatic metallic 'whoosh' or 'impact' SFX triggers at thirteen seconds, coinciding with the appearance of emphatic exclamation marks on screen. The narrator's voice remains high in intensity, stressing the 'spicy' flavor profile of the garlic component. (4) A digital 'sparkle' or magic-style sound effect is heard at twenty-one seconds to signal the transition into a 'hidden eating method.' The background music continues uninterrupted, providing a consistent energy floor. (5) As the cooking montage begins, the narration continues alongside incidental sounds: a soft sizzle of oil and the metallic clinking of tongs against a pan. These sounds are mixed slightly lower than the voice and music. (6) A distinct splash sound of liquid being poured into the pan is audible at thirty-eight seconds, followed by a faint metallic clink of a lid being handled. The music beat provides a rhythmic backbone to these kitchen Foley sounds. (7) At forty-one seconds, the sound of a spatula scraping the surface of the pan is heard, followed by a rhythmic 'whoosh' sound from the pan being tossed. These percussive sounds are synchronized with the visual movement. (8) The final phase sees a return to the studio-style commentary. The music swells slightly in volume during the ending, while the speaker’s valence becomes extremely positive, expressing high satisfaction through enthusiastic inflections.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long black hair, wearing a lavender long-sleeved shirt under a black vest, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is positioned in front of large wooden crates filled with red nectarines. She makes playful gestures towards her head while smiling at the camera. (2) The camera zooms in on a clear plastic bag of nectarines the woman is holding. The bag features a blue and red label with 'White Nectarines' written on it. She rotates the bag to inspect the fruit from different angles. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. Two women are sitting at a dark wood table. One is the woman from the warehouse, and the other has her hair in pigtails and wears a dark green turtleneck. They are eating sliced nectarines from small white and blue ceramic plates, showing the internal white flesh of the fruit to the camera while reacting positively.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a fuzzy light gray cardigan over a black top, stands inside a Costco warehouse. She holds a vacuum-sealed package of marinated chicken legs toward the camera. In the background, the refrigerated meat aisle and other shoppers are visible under bright fluorescent lighting. (2) A close-up view focuses on the chicken product, showing the DaChan brand label and seasoning. Colorful text bubbles with Chinese characters and floral graphics float around the package. The woman's manicured hands carefully rotate the package to show different angles of the meat. (3) The scene shifts to another woman with short hair wearing a black and white bucket hat and a beige top. She stands in the same supermarket setting, pointing and gesturing enthusiastically while discussing the product's price and value compared to regular chicken breasts. (4) The setting transitions to a home kitchen counter with various bottles of vitamins and supplements in the background. A pair of hands is seen placing a baking tray lined with parchment paper and raw marinated chicken thighs into a silver countertop toaster oven. (5) The oven door is opened, revealing the chicken thighs now cooked to a golden-brown, crispy texture. A knife and tongs are used to flip and then cut the chicken on a yellow Pompompurin-themed plate, showcasing the juicy interior of the meat.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 好市多. (2) [Slogan]: 限時特價! [Subtitle]: 臺灣羅勒去骨雞腿肉. (3) [Subtitle]: 幫你去好骨. 現在特價. 每一包. 特價130元. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic-heavy intro phase. A first-person perspective shows a shopping cart being pushed through a vast warehouse aisle. Bright fluorescent lights illuminate the high metal shelves stocked with various palletized goods. An animated male character with an exaggerated expression and red cap appears on the left. Large red and blue "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is centered. Huge bold Traditional Chinese text "好市多" and "每週特價速報" in yellow and white bubbles overlays the center, along with the date "05/26~06/01". (2) The second phase transitions into a fast-paced product showcase. Each shot features a specific household or food item. For example, "Mayflower" tissues are shown as a large stack of purple-wrapped packages. The camera moves in a handheld panning motion. Central objects change every 1-2 seconds. A yellow rectangular text box consistently appears in the center-top, listing the brand and product in black text, with price calculations in red and purple below. The background remains the blurry, brightly lit aisles of the warehouse. (3) In the third phase, the focus shifts to snack products. Large bags of "Boomchickapop" popcorn in purple bags are followed by red boxes of "Imei" dried strawberries. The camera remains at eye-level, capturing the items as if a shopper is looking directly at them. The lighting is consistently bright studio-like warehouse light. Every product has its specific color and texture visible—the glossy plastic of the popcorn bags and the cardboard matte of the snack boxes. No people are clearly identifiable, but the camera movement suggests a human operator. (4) The final phase covers frozen goods and coffee. Trays of frozen fish fillets under plastic wrap are shown in refrigerated displays, followed by stacks of coffee bean bags from brands like Starbucks. The camera pans across long rows of shelves. Text overlays continue to provide pricing details. The video ends with shots of beer cans and household essentials. The background is always the industrial warehouse setting with high ceilings and metal racks. Text presence remains high throughout the entire sequence.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy electronic BGM track characterized by a fast BPM of approximately 128. A male narrator starts speaking immediately with a high vocal arousal and pitch variability. His delivery is extremely rapid, matching the energetic beat. There is a slight echo, but the voice is clear, suggesting a professional studio recording. The ambient room tone of the warehouse is very low. (2) A sharp "ding" sound effect triggers the start of the next phase. The narrator announces the first product, "Mayflower tissues," followed by the price. The music continues with a strong, driving four-on-the-floor beat. The narrator's speech rate is high, around 4-5 on the scale, with almost no pauses between listing the original price and the discounted price. (3) Another "pop" or "ding" SFX marks the transition to the popcorn item. The BGM remains upbeat with synthesized lead melodies and rhythmic percussion. The narrator's tone is consistently enthusiastic and persuasive. Each new product mention is punctuated by a slight shift in vocal inflection. No other voices are heard. The spectral brightness of the track is high, with a crisp high-end frequency balance. (4) Throughout the remainder of the video, frequent "ding" and "whoosh" sound effects occur every 1.5 seconds, signaling each new product display. The narrator's voice maintains a high dominance and confidence level. The music and speech overlap perfectly, with the voice occupying the frequency mid-range and the music filling the bass and treble. The audio finishes with a final enthusiastic call to action, maintaining the same high energy until the end.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a young woman wearing a bright blue fuzzy hood and a black shaggy faux-fur coat sitting at an outdoor red table at night. She is smiling broadly and holding a dessert bowl. Colorful, animated text overlays appear in the center of the frame, introducing a traditional ice cream shop in Tainan. The background consists of a nighttime street with neon signs and parked scooters. (2) The camera moves into several close-up shots of different ice cream dishes. One is a tall glass of strawberry milk frost with large, fresh strawberry slices and condensed milk. Another is a white scalloped bowl containing red bean milk frost. The woman then holds up a white plate containing four square-shaped ice cream blocks in taro and peanut flavors, pointing at them with her finger. (3) The woman is shown tasting the desserts. She takes a spoonful of the strawberry ice cream, showing the inner texture and reacting with an excited, wide-eyed expression. She then tastes the red bean ice cream and the taro blocks. The camera follows her movements with a handheld, dynamic feel, capturing her gestures and positive facial expressions. (4) Another woman with long black hair appears on screen, holding the strawberry ice cream and talking about its flavor profile. She uses a fork to point at the strawberries. Finally, the camera pans to a man in a beige hoodie sitting at the same table, eating the taro blocks. The lighting is consistent throughout, provided by bright indoor-style lights from the shop despite being outdoors.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a close-up of a young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a thin gold necklace. She is standing in a brightly lit toy store filled with gashapon machines and character figurines. She points excitedly at a display case containing LuLu the Piggy figurines, specifically those on a small bridge-like platform. Yellow and red stylized captions flash on the screen to emphasize her enthusiasm. (2) The scene shifts to the woman standing with a friend who wears a white shirt, a black dress, and a navy beret. They are surrounded by shelves stacked with colorful toy boxes. The friend holds two LuLu the Piggy blind boxes as they interact playfully with the camera, making cute expressions and gestures. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the vibrant colors of the toy packaging. (3) A sequence of close-up shots shows the LuLu the Piggy figurines inside a display case. The pigs are depicted in various poses—some are white with blue patterns, others are pink, and one is golden. The woman's hand enters the frame, pointing at a specific soft pink pig. The background is a detailed miniature set with a traditional Chinese theme, including a bridge and decorative scrolls. (4) Back to the two women, they are now holding a blind box and preparing to open it. The woman in the beret carefully peels back the packaging while the other woman watches with anticipation. They are standing in the middle of the store aisle, with toy-filled shelves visible behind them. (5) The woman in the beret pulls out a pink pig figurine. They both react with exaggerated shock and joy, covering their mouths and smiling widely. Large blue and purple stylized text appears on the screen. The woman then shakes the pig figurine, and a small yellow paper stick with printed text pops out from its underside, which she shows to the camera in a close-up shot. The video ends with them posing together, looking happy and successful.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a cream-colored lace dress stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is holding two large Disney-themed plush cushions: a yellow Winnie the Pooh and a blue Stitch. She smiles brightly at the camera, her mouth open in a joyful expression as she introduces the items. The background consists of industrial warehouse shelving units filled with various retail products, large price signs hanging from the ceiling, and shoppers moving through the wide aisles in the distance. (2) The woman shifts her focus to the blue Stitch plush, holding it closer to the lens. She uses her right hand to point toward the lower back area of the creature. She finds a hidden zipper and slowly pulls it across the fabric, revealing a light blue, folded fleece blanket tucked inside the body of the plush toy. Her facial expression shows excitement as she begins to unfold a corner of the blanket, displaying its texture to the viewer. (3) The camera zooms in for an insert shot as the woman's fingers touch the soft, light blue blanket fabric. She rubs the material between her thumb and forefinger to demonstrate its tactile quality. The lighting reflects off the tiny fibers of the fleece, showing a plush, velvety surface. In the background, the original Stitch cushion remains visible, showing its corduroy-like striped outer texture. The woman’s face is partially visible as she leans in, smiling while feeling the fabric. (4) Switching to the yellow Winnie the Pooh plush, the woman demonstrates a unique detail: a small plush bee attached to the zipper tab. She pulls the bee-shaped tab to open the compartment on Pooh's back, pulling out a bright yellow blanket. She holds the plush and the partially removed blanket side-by-side, comparing the colors. Her hand movements are deliberate and quick, showing the functionality of the 2-in-1 design while maintaining a friendly, engaging eye contact with the camera. (5) The woman stands in the center of the frame holding the yellow Pooh plush against her chest. She speaks with animated gestures, pointing toward the item and then toward the camera as if asking a question. She emphasizes the size by stretching the plush out slightly. Large text overlays appear on the screen, highlighting the price. The environment remains a busy retail setting with other merchandise and shelving units framing her, while she maintains a high-energy, enthusiastic presence for the conclusion.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female vocals begin with a bright, friendly tone and high pitch variability, creating a welcoming atmosphere. The background music is a mid-tempo, cheerful acoustic pop track featuring a steady rhythmic beat and light guitar strumming. Ambient warehouse noise, including a low-frequency hum from the ventilation system and distant chatter, is present but kept subordinate to the clear, professional-grade vocal track. The speaker's pitch contour is dynamic, often rising at the end of sentences. (2) A sharp, metallic zipping sound occurs as the woman opens the plush toy's compartment, marking a distinct acoustic event. The female speaker's voice remains consistently energetic as she describes the softness of the item. There is a noticeable, low-frequency rustle of fabric as the fleece blanket is pulled out, creating a textured sound that overlaps with the continuous background music. The speaker maintains a fast speech rate, with very few pauses, reflecting high emotional arousal and excitement. (3) A brief, low-pitched male voice enters the mix with a short, affirmative reaction sound, indicating an interaction behind the camera. The music continues at a steady volume, maintaining a major key tonality that reinforces the positive mood. The female speaker’s vocals show high articulation clarity as she explains the dimensions of the blanket. More soft, broadband rustling sounds of fabric are audible as the material is handled and folded back, providing sensory detail about the product's physical nature. (4) A second zipping sound, slightly higher in pitch due to the speed of movement, occurs when demonstrating the Winnie the Pooh plush. The female speaker’s voice reaches a peak in volume intensity as she reveals the final price. The background music maintains its upbeat tempo, with no significant ducking or swelling. The acoustic environment remains consistent, with a high signal-to-noise ratio where the speech and music dominate over any incidental warehouse noise. The track ends with a clean, fading musical resolution.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens outdoors on a lush green lawn under an overcast sky. A young woman with long black hair, wearing a light pink puff-sleeved top and a long white flowing skirt, bends down to interact with a small white dog in a yellow harness. In the background, a paved path leads through dense green trees and hills. (2) The scene shifts to the interior of a modern geodesic dome tent. The same woman sits on a white spherical pouf next to her white dog. The room features high ceilings with geometric patterns, large panoramic windows overlooking the greenery, and several indoor plants in woven pots. (3) A sequence of fast cuts shows the woman sitting on a white lounge chair within the dome, adjusting her hair while looking into a handheld mirror. Two women are then seen lying together on white beanbags, smiling and relaxing in the bright, naturally lit space. (4) The women are seen riding in a white electric golf cart driven by one wearing a straw hat. They carry their dogs and look excited. Subsequent shots show the interior of a luxurious dome with two large beds, a white desk, and a small teepee-style tent for the dog. (5) A montage of resort activities follows: the women play a classic red arcade game cabinet, stand by a professional poker table, and throw darts at an electronic board. They are also shown singing into microphones at a karaoke station and displaying handmade colorful bath bombs. (6) Food and dining highlights are presented, featuring a large buffet spread with meats, vegetables, and seafood. A woman in a polka-dot dress points at a plate of lobster. Close-ups show an automated noodle cooking station and metal trays filled with fresh hotpot ingredients like corn, meatballs, and greens. (7) The video transitions to night, showing the campsite illuminated by warm string lights and lit-up dome tents. A man at a bar smiles while holding three colorful cocktails. The final scenes show a floating heart-shaped breakfast tray in a blue swimming pool and a wide aerial view of the hillside resort with multiple domes.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: This is a consumer-focused product review aimed at social media audiences. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up shot of a pink display stand inside a Costco warehouse, showcasing multiple pairs of designer sunglasses with price tags. The central focus is a white label showing the price 7,999 for a pair of Gucci glasses. The background consists of shelves stocked with bulk dietary supplements and pharmaceutical products under bright studio-style overhead lights. (3) A different woman wearing a dark blue Kangol beret and a white sleeveless dress is now trying on a pair of oversized square sunglasses featuring large dangling Gucci logo charms. She adjusts the frames and looks in a side mirror, smiling and gesturing towards the unique charms while turning her head to showcase the profile. (4) The first woman in the black top returns to the frame, wearing her selected sunglasses and posing for a close-up. She smiles broadly, revealing white teeth, and uses her hands to push her hair back and settle the glasses on the bridge of her nose. The surrounding environment remains a busy warehouse aisle with blurred passers-by.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman wearing a black beret and a white top stands in a modern living room/kitchen setting. She holds a large blue Kirkland Signature bag of frozen shrimp, smiling broadly and gesturing toward it. The background is brightly lit with warm indoor lights. (2) The scene shifts to a close-up of a glass bowl containing raw, peeled shrimp. A hand pours white rum from a Bacardi bottle over the shrimp. The counter is white and clean. (3) The camera focuses on a tall, stainless steel electric pepper grinder as it grinds black peppercorns directly onto the shrimp in the bowl. (4) An overhead shot shows olive oil being poured from a white dispenser into a grey stone-textured frying pan on a gas stove. (5) Minced garlic is added to the heated oil in the pan, and the pan is tilted to distribute the garlic. (6) The shrimp are placed individually into the hot pan using silver metal tongs. Sizzling oil is visible around the garlic and shrimp. (7) A square pat of yellow butter is added to the center of the pan on top of the cooking shrimp. (8) As the shrimp turn pink and opaque, the electric grinder is used again to season them with more pepper. (9) A hand sprinkles white salt over the pan. (10) The cook tosses the pan, showing the shrimp coated in a glossy garlic-butter sauce, nearly finished.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a fast-paced, high-energy male narrator introducing the Costco weekly specials. The voice is enthusiastic with a clear, projected tone. Background music is an upbeat, major-key electronic pop track with a steady, driving beat. (2) As the visuals transition between products, the narrator rapidly lists each item and its sale price. The speech rate is extremely high, with almost no pauses between phrases. The music remains consistent in volume and tempo, providing a rhythmic bed for the voice. (3) Periodic subtle 'whoosh' sound effects are audible during visual transitions, coinciding with the narrator switching to a new product name. The acoustic environment is clean, resembling a studio recording rather than field audio from the store. (4) The narrator continues his high-arousal delivery through the entire list, maintaining a positive and authoritative tone. The music builds slightly in energy but does not overshadow the clear articulation of the prices. The audio ends abruptly as the final item is mentioned.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey wool coat, stands in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. She is holding a large green and clear plastic bag of Japanese Butter Potatoes. Her facial expression is excited as she points at the bag and gestures toward the refrigerated display case behind her, which is filled with rows of the same product. The background shows blurred shoppers and Costco signage like 'CAKES'. (2) The camera zooms in on a white price tag displaying '555249 JAPAN BUTTER POTATO $349'. The woman's hand points specifically at the product details. Then, a quick cut shows multiple blue boxes lined up on a metal refrigerated shelf, each containing several bags of the potatoes. The lighting is sterile and bright from overhead fluorescent lamps. (3) The woman is seen again, now speaking animatedly with varied hand gestures, still holding the potato bag. She turns slightly to show the scale of the display. Large yellow and white subtitles appear at the bottom of the screen. The scene is full of visual movement as she adjusts the bag and talks directly into the camera. (4) The setting shifts to a cozy indoor living room with warm lighting. Two women sit at a white table. The woman from before is on the left, and another woman wearing a dark blue beret and white sweater is on the right. They are holding the same potato package, discussing it. They use forks to pick up small pieces of cooked potato from a blue bowl on the table. (5) A close-up shot shows a fork holding a bite-sized piece of yellowish potato. One woman is seen tasting it and reacting with a thoughtful expression. They continue to talk, gesturing with their hands toward the food and each other. In the background, a simple white wall and a hint of a kitchen area are visible.

Background music is a high-tempo, major-mode electronic track with a steady beat at approximately 120 BPM. A subtle 'ding' sound effect occurs as she highlights the product's return. Minimal ambient supermarket floor noise is heard. (2) A distinct 'rustle' of plastic packaging triggers this phase. The vocal intensity remains high as the speaker describes the quantity and price. The BGM continues with a bright, synth-heavy texture. No significant pauses occur in the speech, maintaining a fast-paced conversational flow with clear articulation. (3) A 'click' sound from the camera transition marks a new phase. The narration shifts to a duo format with two female voices interacting. The pitch variability is high as they emphasize words like '紳士' and '男爵'. The BGM swells slightly in volume during transitions between spoken sentences. (4) A 'ding' SFX marks the mention of the flavor review. The female voices discuss the seasoning, noting it is slightly light. The acoustic environment is now a quiet indoor space with very low room tone. The music maintains its energetic, comedic vibe, perfectly synced with the fast-paced vocal delivery. (5) A metallic 'clink' of a fork against a plate initiates the final phase. The speakers provide a comparative recommendation for Australian potatoes. The vocal tone is friendly and informative. The BGM fades out slightly as the video concludes, ending on a high-energy vocal note.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a close-up of a refrigerated display at Costco, filled with vacuum-packed meat. A prominent 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is overlayed at the top of the frame. The lighting is bright and clinical, typical of a warehouse store. (2) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black dress with a chest cutout and large earrings, stands in the store aisle. She holds a smartphone and speaks enthusiastically, gesturing towards the meat. In the background, other shoppers and grocery carts are visible in the wide, bright aisle. (3) The camera zooms in on the product, 'Low-salt boneless duck legs'. The packaging features a duck logo and Chinese text. The woman's hands are seen holding the double-pack, pointing out the flat, clean skin and vacuum seal. (4) The setting transitions to a modern indoor kitchen. Two raw duck legs are placed on a wire rack. A hand applies seasonings, including black pepper, salt, and garlic powder. A clear spice grinder with Sichuan peppercorns is used to add flavor. (5) Close-up shot of the duck legs frying skin-side down in a stainless steel skillet. The meat sizzles as the skin browns into a golden-brown, crispy texture. Wisps of steam and bubbling fat are visible, highlighting the cooking process. (6) A knife slices through the cooked duck leg on a black cutting board, revealing succulent, pinkish-brown meat. The woman appears again, holding a small plate with a piece of meat and a slice of bread, showing an expression of pure delight. (7) The woman is seated at a table with a complete plate of sliced duck. She holds a piece up to the camera with her fingers, demonstrating its flexibility and texture. The background shows a cozy home interior with shelves and plush toys.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) [Pop SFX] triggers. A female voice starts with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and rapid speech rate, introducing the restaurant booking tips. The background music is an upbeat electronic pop track with a clear major-mode feel and a steady 125 BPM four-on-the-floor beat. (2) [Whoosh SFX] triggers. The narrator maintains a fast, energetic pace, explaining the monthly reservation window with frequent rising intonations. The audio is studio-clean with no audible ambient distractions, and the electronic synthesizers in the music provide a vibrant, modern texture. (3) [Ding SFX] triggers. A sharp, percussive chime highlights the second method involving telephone calls. The speaker's arousal level remains high, with intense and projected vocal delivery that stays perfectly intelligible over the rhythmic BGM bed. (4) [Digital UI SFX] triggers. The voice adopts a slightly more playful intonation while explaining the final booking strategy. The music remains continuous and bright, with sharp spectral characteristics. A final rising vocal contour concludes the track with a joyful tone as she gives a call to action.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor supermarket setting, specifically within a Costco warehouse. Two women are looking into a glass-topped freezer unit. The woman on the right wears a dark blue off-shoulder ruffled top, a dark beret, and holds her hand to her chest with an expressive face. The woman on the left wears a white puffy-sleeved top and leans in to see the products. The background shows retail shelves and industrial lighting. (2) Close-up shot of a transparent plastic container holding four large sub sandwiches. Each sandwich is visible through the plastic, containing multiple whole bright red strawberries nestled in a bed of shredded brown pork floss and white cream. Price tags and nutritional labels are stuck to the top. (3) Returning to the medium shot at the freezer, the women gesture excitedly. The woman in the beret points towards a nearly empty shelf inside the freezer, while the other woman adjusts her hair. Their facial expressions are animated, showing surprise and intrigue. (4) Narrative shift to an indoor home living room. The same two women are seated at a wooden table. The woman in the beret holds a single sandwich, which has been partially sliced, up to the lens to reveal a cross-section of red jam and cream. A leather couch and plush toys are visible in the background. (5) Close-up shot on the wooden table where a knife is used to cut through the soft bread of the sandwich. The focus is on the layers of strawberries, pork floss, and filling. Hand gestures are used to highlight the size of the fruit. (6) The women are shown tasting the sandwich. They react with wide smiles, nodding, and thumbs-up gestures toward the camera, indicating high satisfaction. The lighting is bright and warm.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women are standing in a Costco warehouse aisle. The woman on the left wears a black and white zebra-pattern bucket hat, a white off-the-shoulder ruffle top, a black choker, and white clogs. The woman on the right has long black hair and wears a white knit dress with silver earrings. They walk together, arm-in-arm, beside a shopping cart filled with various bulk items like snacks and paper towels. The background is filled with tall industrial shelves stacked with products under bright, flat warehouse lighting. (2) The woman in the zebra hat is crouched in a refrigerated section in front of rows of green bottles. She picks up a bottle of 'Natural Benefits' green juice, showing its label to the camera. The scene shifts to an indoor kitchen with bright lighting where she pours the thick green liquid into a glass filled with ice cubes. She then adds white 'AB' yogurt to the glass, stirring the mixture with a green straw before taking a sip and smiling with squinted eyes. (3) The scene returns to the Costco refrigerated aisle where the woman in the hat reaches into a freezer to pull out a transparent plastic tray containing three large sandwiches. A close-up shot reveals the sandwiches are filled with white shredded meat, green cabbage, and bright orange fish roe. Back in the kitchen, she places a sandwich on a wooden cutting board and slices it in half with a small knife, revealing a creamy interior. She then takes a large bite, chewing with an appreciative expression. (4) Both women are seen crouched in front of a wall of red and white 'Dr.FORHAIR' shampoo boxes at Costco, pointing at the product. The setting shifts to a home dining table where the shampoo set is displayed. In a brightly lit bathroom, the woman with long hair has her head over a sink while another person's hands apply white foam and massage her scalp. She then uses a black hair dryer to blow out her long, dark, straight hair, which appears shiny and voluminous. A split-screen comparison shows 'Before' and 'After' shots of her hair volume and scalp health.

[Variety]: 順暢! OMG. (3) [Subtitle]: 一定要回購的豪華蟹肉沙拉堡. 滿滿的蟹肉絲及魚卵增添鮮味. 檸檬沙拉爽口配上蓬鬆軟Q的麵包. 還有蘋果丁西洋芹增添口感. 平均一個160元一點也不貴. (4) [Subtitle]: 韓國OLIVE YOUNG爆紅必買的養髮神器. 好市多搶先上市. Dr.FORHAIR 固髮煥活洗髮露. 好市多獨家限定套裝. 大容量750ml+旅行用70ml. 這樣價格只要729元. 伯爵茶優雅的香氣. 有清爽微涼的感覺. 而且很持久. 連吹頭髮都更加舒服. 適合炎熱黏膩的夏天. 洗一次髮根就馬上變蓬鬆. 頭髮蓬了臉看起來就更小了. 最重要的是它能強化髮根減少掉髮. 我以前洗完頭一定要清地板. 但現在一週清一次就好囉. 養護頭髮就從現在開始. 秘密武器就是Folligen Vital 5X Complex. 比毛孔小2500倍. 因此頭皮更容易吸收. 不只洗淨更是專業養護你的頭皮. 使用後有效減少頭皮油脂. (3) A sharp, percussive 'crunch' sound effect is heard, followed by a wet tearing sound as a knife slices through a soft object. (4) A 'shushing' sound of running water and the mechanical hum of a hair dryer dominate the acoustic scene. The narrator provides a detailed product description with a persuasive, narrative tone. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black apron, stands in a large retail warehouse. She holds a cardboard box containing seven pink and red peaches. In the background, there are stacks of green and yellow boxes, and multiple shoppers are visible moving through the aisles under bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera transitions to a close-up shot of the peaches. Seven large, fuzzy peaches with a blend of deep red and soft pink skin are arranged in a red plastic mold inside a cardboard box. One peach has a small blue sticker on it. (3) The scene returns to the woman in the warehouse. She points to the peaches and gestures with her hands while looking directly at the camera. A hand enters the frame from the left, pointing a finger at the peaches. The background remains a busy warehouse interior with shoppers and pallets of goods. (4) The setting shifts to an indoor room, likely a living room. Two women sit at a table; the first woman from the previous scene and another woman wearing a black-and-white zebra-patterned bucket hat. They hold up a whole peach and a slice of peach on a small fork. In the background, several plush toys and household items are visible on shelves under soft indoor lighting. (5) The two women are seen eating the peach slices from a pink heart-shaped plate. They look at each other and the camera, making hand gestures like the 'OK' sign. The woman in the hat holds the large peach close to the camera to show its size and then compares it to the pit.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a woman wearing a blue beret and a dark blue off-the-shoulder top standing in a Costco warehouse. She is holding a large plastic container of prepared noodles. Behind her are rows of refrigerated shelves filled with packaged meat and meals under bright warehouse lighting. Her facial expression is animated and friendly as she speaks to the camera. (2) A sharp transition to a close-up of the food label which reads 'CANTONESE FRIED NOODLE WITH BARBECUE PORK' with a price of '$269/KG'. The camera then shows a top-down view of the ingredients inside the package: yellow noodles, sliced pork, green vegetables, carrots, and mushrooms. (3) The scene shifts to a kitchen setting where the woman is stir-frying the ingredients in a black wok over a blue gas flame. She uses tongs to toss the pork and vegetables, then adds the noodles and pours a dark brown sauce from a plastic packet. The steam rises as the food cooks. (4) The final phase shows the main woman and another woman in a purple shirt sitting at a wooden dining table in a home environment. The woman in purple is eating the noodles with chopsticks while the main woman gestures enthusiastically, holding up four fingers and pointing to the bowl. The background contains shelves with various small objects and plush toys, illuminated by warm indoor lighting.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a wide perspective of a Costco warehouse interior. In the foreground, a large digital overlay features the Costco Wholesale logo, a cartoon character of a shouting man, and text announcing weekly special reports. The background shows wooden pallets stacked with cardboard boxes under bright, cool-toned industrial warehouse lighting. (2) The scene transitions to a medium shot of Kleenex toilet paper packages in purple wrapping, stacked on pallets. Yellow price labels are visible on the shelves in the distant background. The camera is slightly handheld, creating a dynamic shopping-trip feel. (3) A series of rapid cuts follows, showcasing various food products. First, packages of raw Iberico pork and local chicken are shown in refrigerated displays. The meat is pink and well-marinated, tightly sealed in plastic. The lighting here is bright and sterile, typical of a supermarket cooler. (4) The sequence continues through the dairy and snack aisles. Plastic cups of mango pudding with yellow fruit pieces are displayed, followed by blue cartons of I-Mei soy milk and white bottles of yogurt. The background remains consistent with retail shelving and distant shoppers moving occasionally. (5) The final phases show household goods and beverages. Containers of Orange House detergent are stacked in bulk. The camera then moves to aisles filled with canned juices, bottled water, and finally, rows of wine and beer boxes. High-contrast text overlays appear over every product to display pricing information.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young women stand outdoors at night. The woman on the left wears a purple top and jeans, while the woman on the right wears a black off-shoulder top and a beige bucket hat. Large bright signage for Costco Wholesale is visible behind them. They gesture animatedly with their hands and point towards the camera while speaking with expressive facial features. (2) The camera follows the two women as they walk away from the camera on a paved sidewalk at night. They are heading toward the entrance of a building labeled "JC PARK" with glass doors. One woman waves her hand back toward the camera as they approach the lit entrance. (3) In a bright indoor retail setting, a hand points to various Oral-B dental products. Close-ups show a pack of 8 toothbrush heads and an electric toothbrush set. Price tags with discounted numbers are clearly displayed on the shelf next to the items. The shelves are filled with boxed inventory. (4) One of the women holds up a large black IRIS Ohyama air fryer oven box in an aisle filled with cardboard boxes of household appliances. She smiles and looks at the camera while presenting the item. The lighting is flat and bright, typical of a warehouse or retail store. (5) A sequence of close-up shots displays a variety of kitchen knives in their packaging. The knives have different finishes, including one with a colorful, iridescent titanium coating. The items are hanging on a metal rack within the retail space. (6) Further close-ups show various household goods such as Olay skin cream, Elixir serum, Shiseido lotion, Tide laundry pods, and Calvin Klein underwear packs. Each item has a promotional price tag attached. The background remains a blurry retail aisle. (7) The woman in the beige hat squats next to a "Ms. Pac-Man" arcade game machine on a shelf. She points at the machine and smiles at the camera. The surrounding area is packed with various toys and boxed goods in a warehouse-style shopping environment.

She holds a white cardboard cake box containing a round cake. Behind her are industrial refrigerated shelves filled with various packaged cakes and pastries. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment. (2) The camera transitions to an extreme close-up of the cake inside the box. The cake is white with a thick layer of translucent, yellowish peach cubes and jelly on the top center. The texture appears moist and glossy. No people are visible in this specific frame, only the product. (3) A metal cake server lifts a triangular slice of the cake from a white plate. The cross-section reveals layers of white sponge cake alternating with thick layers of white cream and embedded fruit pieces. The background is a grey marbled countertop under bright indoor lighting. (4) Two women are seated at a white table indoors. The first woman from the previous scenes is on the left, and a second woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat is on the right. They are gesturing toward the cut cake on the table while talking and expressing various facial reactions including surprise and delight. The background is a softly lit domestic interior with a partial view of a room and shelves.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title card featuring the Costco Wholesale logo against a blue and red background. An animated character, Ralph from 'Wreck-It Ralph', is positioned on the left with a curious expression. Below him, large yellow and red Chinese text announces 'Costco Weekly Special Report' for the dates September 8th to 14th. The background behind the text shows a blurred Costco warehouse exterior under a bright, daylight sky. (2) A rapid series of jump cuts begins, showcasing various consumer products stacked on wooden pallets inside a bright warehouse environment. The lighting is consistent, high-intensity studio or warehouse lighting. Each product is centered in the frame, often stacked high. (3) The sequence continues through dozens of products: packs of toilet paper, trays of raw steaks, boxes of diapers, large bottles of laundry detergent, and rows of snacks and beverages. Occasionally, a human hand is visible reaching for or pointing at a product, but no full bodies or faces of real people are clear. (4) The editing remains very fast-paced, with each item appearing for roughly one to two seconds. Backgrounds show the characteristic steel shelving and concrete floors of a large retail warehouse. Text overlays in high-contrast yellow and red consistently appear in the center-top and middle of the frame to provide product details and price points.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator introducing the 'Costco Weekly Special Report'. The background music is an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track with a strong 4/4 beat. (2) As the visual cuts begin, a sharp 'whoosh' transition sound effect triggers at every single visual cut, approximately once per second. The narrator maintains an extremely fast speech rate, delivering product names and prices with high enthusiasm and rhythmic precision. (3) The interplay between the fast narration and the recurring SFX creates a sense of urgency and information density. The background music remains continuous and consistent in volume, providing a driving energy beneath the voice. (4) Each new product mentioned is anchored by a slight vocal inflection peak and a corresponding 'whoosh' sound, ensuring that the listener can distinguish between the dozens of items being listed in rapid succession.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Information Montage -> Repetition
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a promotional catalog designed to quickly inform viewers about limited-time discounts at Costco. By using a rapid-fire editing style and high-energy narration, it creates a sense of abundance and urgency, encouraging viewers to visit the store before the sale ends.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly lists Costco and dozens of commercial brands with clear pricing and discount information.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Extremely high information density typical of social media marketing for retail discounts. The sync between the fast visual cuts, transition SFX, and rapid narration is highly effective for retention.

She holds a large brown box of Lotte Dream Cake chocolate pies, pointing at it while speaking expressively. The background is filled with rows of supermarket shelves stocked with snack products. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor living room. The woman is seated behind a table with two boxes of the chocolate pies. Behind her is a brown leather sofa and a small pink child's toy. She gestures with her hands, describing the product. (3) A sequence of close-up shots follows, showing the product box packaging and then a cross-section of the chocolate pie on a small purple plate, revealing its white cream layer.
