She continues her review, gesturing with a 'seven' sign and finally holding up the boxes with a wide smile to the camera.

She is positioned in front of a shelf filled with plastic-packaged pastries. She leans in to look at a box of French desserts, her facial expression showing curiosity. The background features typical warehouse shelving, shoppers in the distance, and shopping carts. (2) The woman picks up a container of 'French Dessert Set' containing Canelés and Madeleines, holding it towards the camera. She points at the individual items with her finger, smiling and talking. Large text overlays and a Costco logo appear on the screen. (3) The scene shifts to an indoor home environment with warm, soft lighting. Two women sit at a gray table; one is the woman from the previous scene, and the other wears a black-and-white patterned bucket hat. They have plates with the desserts and a birdcage is visible in the background. (4) A close-up shot shows a hand using a metal knife to cut a golden-brown Madeleine and a dark Canelé on a wooden cutting board. The internal texture of the cakes is clearly visible, showing a soft, porous crumb. (5) Back to the two women at the table, they are shown tasting the desserts, making exaggerated facial expressions of enjoyment. They hold pieces of the cake up to the camera to show the details while continuing their discussion.

She continues to smile and engage with the camera, her movements are fluid and energetic. The background remains the same warehouse setting with green produce boxes. (4) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor home kitchen or dining area. Two women, including the one from the previous scenes, are sitting at a table. They are both holding individual vacuum-sealed yellow corn cobs. They demonstrate opening the packaging and taking large bites of the corn. audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy male narrator introducing the Costco weekly report in Traditional Chinese. His delivery is extremely fast and enthusiastic, set against a constant, upbeat electronic pop background track with a prominent synth beat. (2) As the products cycle visually, the narrator rapidly lists each item name and its discounted price. There are no significant pauses; the speech is a continuous stream of information. The BGM maintains a steady 128 BPM tempo throughout, providing a consistent rhythmic floor. (3) The vocal intensity remains high and persuasive, peaking during price reveals. The recording quality is studio-clean with no environmental noise or SFX interference. (4) The audio concludes with a final energetic pitch for the last alcoholic products, ending abruptly with the music without a fade-out.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a dark, semi-sheer layered top, stands in a brightly lit warehouse-style supermarket. She is positioned in front of towering shelves stocked with numerous gold and red boxes of 'Great Day' scallop chicken essence porridge. She points at the products and speaks directly to the camera with expressive facial gestures. The background displays industrial shelving and various bulk-packaged goods typical of a wholesale store. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit indoor living room setting. The same woman in the beret is joined by another woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat. They are seated at a grey marble-textured table, holding up a product box and a smaller white individual serving pouch to the camera. The lighting is warm and domestic, with a blurred background showing home furniture. (3) The camera shows close-up shots of white, creamy porridge in a clear glass bowl, with visible rice grains and small pieces of scallop. The two women are then seen using metal spoons to taste the porridge from the bowl. They look at each other and the camera, nodding and gesturing with their hands as they discuss the flavor. Colorful graphic text overlays appear frequently around them to emphasize their reactions.

She has a neutral but focused expression, looking towards the camera while other shoppers and carts are visible in the blurred background. (3) The scene transitions to a domestic indoor setting, likely a living room or kitchen area with warmer, softer lighting. The original woman is now joined by another female companion wearing a patterned bucket hat and a white top. They are seated behind a table, holding individual blueberries up to the lens for close-up examination. (4) The camera captures extreme close-ups of the blueberries, revealing their waxy coating and large size. The two women are seen reacting with thumbs-up gestures and happy facial expressions while sampling the fruit. A small pink plate with more blueberries sits on the table in front of them, and background details include soft-colored furniture and pet enclosures.

A young woman wearing a black and white patterned bucket hat and a white ruffled blouse stands in front of a refrigerated freezer section. She holds a large, clear vacuum-sealed bag of Supreme Salmon, pointing at the label with a bright smile. (2) The scene shifts to a modern kitchen with white countertops. A pair of hands is shown carefully drying a thick salmon fillet with a white paper towel on a stainless steel wire rack. The lighting is focused and clear, highlighting the fresh texture of the fish. (3) The hands use a professional chef's knife to score the skin of the salmon in a criss-cross diamond pattern. The camera is at a top-down angle, providing an extreme close-up of the delicate cutting process. (4) A packet of creamy yellow sauce is squeezed over the salmon fillet. The background shows a clean kitchen environment with nested plates and scissors nearby. Yellow and white variety-style text overlays appear at the top. (5) In the final phase, the original girl is joined by another woman in a black beret. They are seated at a dining table with a plate of cooked salmon. They use forks to sample the fish, showing its flaky texture to the camera while smiling and gesturing enthusiastically. They hold up individual salmon portions in their original packaging to the lens.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco supermarket aisle. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black beret and a white lace sleeveless top, holds a large green box of Bibigo frozen shrimp dumplings. She points at the box and towards the camera with an energetic and enthusiastic facial expression. Behind her, the background features towering refrigerated shelves stocked with various frozen food products under cool fluorescent lighting. (2) Following several quick jump cuts in the store, the scene transitions to a cozy indoor home environment. The same woman, now wearing a zebra-print bucket hat, sits at a wooden table next to a friend with a black headband. They are presented with a blue ceramic plate containing several golden-brown fried dumplings. The lighting is warm and domestic, with plush toys and a computer screen visible in the soft-focus background. (3) A tight close-up shot captures the woman in the zebra hat as she carefully uses her fingers to pull a long, whole pink shrimp out of a partially opened dumpling. This action highlights the specific texture and size of the filling for the viewer. The camera then cuts back to a medium shot showing both women as they gesture towards the plate and the product packaging while continuing their lively discussion. (4) The video continues with dynamic shots of the two women reacting to the food. They use expressive hand gestures and exaggerated facial expressions to convey their surprise at the price and their satisfaction with the taste. The final shots show them holding the product box together, looking directly at the camera. The editing maintains a fast pace with numerous cuts between the speakers and the food.

The speaker's pitch is notably high and the delivery is very rapid, characteristic of a promotional social media vlog style. A faint, low-frequency hum of a busy supermarket environment is present but kept at a low volume in the background. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect triggers a transition in the audio track. The acoustic texture shifts as the supermarket hum is replaced by a cleaner, quieter indoor room tone. A second female voice enters the mix with a warm and friendly tone. The music continues with steady percussive beats. (3) The sound of a ceramic plate clinking on a hard surface is clearly audible as food is presented. This is immediately followed by a synchronized, high-pitched 'Whoa!' from both speakers, marking a moment of surprise. The vocal prosody becomes more dynamic with frequent laughter and pitch swings. (4) A soft rustling sound of cardboard being handled occurs as the product packaging is moved. The speakers engage in a fast-paced dialogue about the cost per unit. The background music swells slightly in volume during gaps in speech to maintain the high energy of the production. (5) The video ends with a final enthusiastic remark and a peak in the music volume. The overall audio mix is clear with high vocal presence and minimal environmental interference, signifying a high-quality post-production effort.

The creators use a high-energy, humorous approach to engage viewers while demonstrating the product's key selling point—a whole shrimp in each dumpling—to justify its relatively high price point.

Bright warehouse lighting illuminates the background, where other shoppers and tall shelves are visible. (2) A rapid montage begins, starting with a 18.9-inch bear decoration dressed in traditional red Chinese attire holding a lantern. The camera remains static on the object while price text overlays appear in the center. (3) The sequence cuts through various grocery items: vacuum-packed chicken breast, plastic-wrapped beef slices, and trays of duck meat. Each shot is a close-up or medium shot of the product on a refrigerated shelf, accompanied by large red and yellow price stickers. (4) The focus shifts to the beverage section, showing rows of red wine bottles and stacks of blue Chivas Regal whiskey boxes. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the branding on the packaging. (5) A series of snack and dry good shots follow, featuring stacks of Crown crackers, Kirin beer boxes, and bags of Cheetos and Ruffles. The camera captures these items in their bulk packaging on warehouse pallets. (6) The montage continues with frozen seafood (shrimp), pork knuckles, and large boxes of milk powder. The final shots feature frozen desserts like Häagen-Dazs ice cream and decorative lucky tree potted plants arranged in a row near the exit.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio opens with a high-energy, fast-paced male narrator announcing 'Costco this week's special report!' accompanied by bright, rhythmic electronic dance music. The voice is enthusiastic and projected, using a rising intonation typical of promotional broadcasts. (2) As the visual montage begins, the narrator lists items and prices with extreme speed, saying 'New Year bear decoration special price 999... Thirteen spice chicken breast 210...'. Each product name is enunciated clearly despite the high speech rate. (3) The BGM continues as a steady, high-tempo underscore with synth pulses and a driving electronic beat. There are no pauses in the vocal delivery as the speaker moves from liquor to snacks, maintaining a constant high arousal level. (4) The final segment maintains the same hyper-edited pace. The narrator lists household staples and holiday gifts like 'New Zealand milk powder 529' and 'Money tree plant 1200'. The track ends abruptly as the visual transitions to the final logo, with no fade out.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy pop/electronic music bed featuring a driving 4/4 beat. A male narrator introduces the segment with a very fast speech rate and high vocal arousal, speaking in Traditional Chinese with an excited, promotional tone. (2) As the products cycle visually, the narrator rapidly lists each item and its corresponding discounted price. The speech is continuous with almost no pauses, synchronized with the fast visual cuts. (3) Occasional 'pop' and 'whoosh' sound effects are added in post-production to emphasize price drops or scene transitions. The background music remains consistent throughout, providing a rhythmic backbone to the narration. (4) The track concludes with a final energetic CTA from the narrator, maintaining high volume and clarity until the very end, with the music fading out quickly after the last word.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black long-sleeved top and a brown pleated skirt, stands on a sunny street corner in Tainan, Taiwan. Behind her is a traditional bakery stall with a large yellow sign and a green awning. (2) Close-up shots highlight brown paper bags with red branding for '阿堯師老正牌雞蛋糕'. The camera pans across multiple bags filled with snacks. (3) The scene shifts to the cooking area where circular egg cakes are being prepared in metal molds. A hand uses a metal pick to flip and remove the golden-brown cakes. (4) The woman is joined by a friend wearing a white lace dress and a blue fuzzy hat. They stand together on the street, holding the bag of cakes and talking to the camera. (5) Detailed close-ups show the women breaking the cakes open with their hands to reveal cream and red bean fillings. They take bites and react with expressions of enjoyment and surprise. (6) The video concludes with the primary woman sitting in the back seat of a car, holding the snack bag and giving a final summary of her experience.

(2) The camera zooms in on a white price tag attached to the plant rack. It lists 'FIDDLE LEAF FIG' and a price of '$899'. A hand with pale skin enters the frame, pointing directly at the price. The vibrant green leaves of the plant frame the tag in a close-up shot. (3) Back to a medium shot of the woman standing beside the potted plants. She continues her animated presentation, using wide hand gestures. In the background, other customers and warehouse shelves stacked with bulky boxes are visible under the cool, overhead fluorescent lighting. (4) A close-up view of the care instructions on the plant's tag shows three blue bullet points detailing watering and sunlight needs. A finger points at each instruction. The woman's sheer sleeve is partially visible as she holds the tag steady for the camera. (5) The woman stands back and continues talking expressively, smiling and waving her hands to emphasize the value. Other shoppers are blurred in the distant background, and a metal shopping cart is partially visible to her left.

The surrounding environment remains the well-lit, busy aisle of the warehouse store, with more products visible in the deep background.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy electronic pop music with a prominent, fast-paced beat begins immediately. A male narrator delivers an enthusiastic opening greeting in Traditional Chinese, characterized by a high-pitched, energetic tone and sharp articulation. A digital whoosh sound effect punctuates the transition from the outdoor setting to the first indoor product shot. (2) The male narrator begins a rapid-fire sequence of product descriptions, reading names and prices in strict synchronization with each jump cut. A short, bright digital 'ding' or 'pop' sound effect triggers at every single visual transition. The background music maintains a constant high-tempo major mode, sitting well below the dominant and projected vocal track. (3) The vocal delivery continues with high arousal and a professional yet excited tone, maintaining a consistent speech rate of nearly 4 words per second. There is zero ambient background noise, indicating a high-quality studio mix. The interplay of the driving electronic beat, the rhythmic narrator cadence, and the repetitive transition SFX creates a sense of high informational density and promotional urgency until the video ends.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women stand in a brightly lit warehouse aisle, likely a Costco based on the large red and blue logo overlay. The woman on the left wears a dark beret and a dark off-the-shoulder top, holding a large watermelon-shaped plush pillow and a strawberry one. The woman on the right wears a white, textured dress and holds a large avocado plush and a lemon wedge plush. They both smile widely and sway rhythmically. Yellow and orange text overlays appear at the bottom. The background consists of tall industrial shelving packed with large items, and a few blurred shoppers are visible in the distance. (2) The camera zooms slightly as the women begin to showcase the pillows individually. The woman in the white dress lifts the lemon wedge pillow, which has vibrant yellow and white segments and a green backing. The woman in the beret holds the strawberry, which is bright red with black seed patterns and a green felt stem at the top. They alternate moving the watermelon (pink with black seeds and green rind) and the avocado (green skin, light green interior, and a brown pit) toward the camera. Large text indicating the price 459元 and a descriptive slogan appears prominently at the bottom. (3) The scene transitions into a demonstration of the pillows' softness. The women press their faces into the plush surfaces of the strawberry and avocado pillows to emphasize their squishy texture. The woman on the left leans toward the right, playfully bumping the pillows together. The lighting remains consistent, bright, and flat, typical of a large retail warehouse. They continue to speak with animated facial expressions, including raised eyebrows and wide smiles, while gesturing toward the items to show their scale. (4) The focus shifts to a specific feature: a hidden zipper. The woman in the white dress turns the avocado pillow over to reveal a green zipper track on its dark green skin. She pulls the zipper slightly to show the opening, while the woman in the beret looks on with an exaggerated expression of surprise. A red bubble with white text pops up on the screen to highlight the zipper. The background remains the warehouse aisle with pillows and boxes visible on the shelves. (5) In the final phase, both women hug all four fruit pillows together in a group embrace. They wave at the camera and continue their high-energy delivery. The watermelon, strawberry, lemon, and avocado pillows are clustered in the center of the frame. The video ends with a celebratory graphic or text overlay as they both smile and gesture goodbye with their hands, showcasing the complete set one last time.

(5) The voices reach a peak in volume and pitch as they conclude the segment. A final ding SFX sounds, followed by a quick fade-out of both the speech and the BGM. (2) As the video cut-rate increases, the narrator's speech becomes near-continuous, listing product names and their specific prices with rhythmic precision. Each transition between products is aurally signaled by the narrator's consistent pitch inflections. (4) The music remains steady in volume and intensity throughout, serving as a pulse for the information delivery. The narration maintains a high level of vocal arousal, conveying excitement about the discounts mentioned. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene begins in a brightly lit supermarket aisle, specifically a refrigerated section with shelves full of packaged food. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in the foreground. She holds a clear plastic bag containing several roasted chicken legs with a red and black 'Kirkland Signature' label. She smiles and gestures towards the package with her right hand while looking directly at the camera. (2) The camera moves closer to the chicken package as another person's hand enters the frame from the left, pointing and tapping on the bag to emphasize the contents. The lighting is crisp and even, highlighting the glistening texture of the roasted skin through the plastic. The woman continues to talk, her facial expressions animated with enthusiasm, frequently shifting the bag's position. (3) The setting transitions to a warm, indoor living room environment. Two women are seated behind a white table. The woman from the previous scene is on the left, now accompanied by a friend on the right wearing a blue denim top, a white t-shirt, and a light blue bucket hat. They both wear disposable plastic gloves. On the table are two black plates, each holding large roasted chicken legs. The woman on the right holds a chicken leg on a red plate, presenting it to the camera while the woman on the left begins to take a large bite of her chicken leg. (4) The two women continue their review, pulling apart the meat to show its tenderness and the accumulation of natural juices (chicken oil) at the bottom of the plate. The woman in the hat gestures with a thumbs up and points at the food, her eyes wide with a positive reaction. They hold up a chicken leg next to their hands to compare the size. The background shows domestic furniture, including a couch and some toys, creating a casual home atmosphere.

(2) Product Rundown: The narrator continues a fast-paced delivery, reciting names and discounted prices for dozens of various products. His tone is consistently animated and persuasive, typical of promotional media. The background music maintains its energetic electronic rhythm, perfectly complementing the rapid vocal pace. (3) Closing: The voiceover concludes with an enthusiastic call-to-action, urging listeners to follow for more shopping updates. The intensity remains high until the final second of the recording. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a high-energy graphic overlay featuring the Costco Wholesale logo, animated fire effects at the bottom, and a cartoon character on the left. A person's hand pushes a metal shopping cart filled with items through a brightly lit warehouse aisle with high industrial ceilings and long rows of shelving. (2) A transition leads into a rapid sequence of household goods; a hand touches a multi-colored patterned memory foam floor mat displayed on a shelf. The scene shifts quickly to a large blue hardshell suitcase with a textured surface, followed by black winter gloves packaged in yellow boxes, all under bright fluorescent lighting. (3) The showcase continues with portable heaters and stainless steel warming units stacked in their retail packaging; a hand points toward the price tags. Small red electronic hand warmers are shown in a row, followed by black garden hose reels and boxes of Japanese-made mosquito repellent sheets, maintaining a fast-paced visual rhythm. (4) Decorative items and toys appear next, including a large ceramic-style Christmas bear statue wearing a green sweater and a set of Disney princess dolls in pink and yellow dresses. Blue and white umbrellas are displayed in vertical bins, and a hand lifts a white 10kg adjustable dumbbell from its box on a lower shelf. (5) Personal care products like Bioderma cleansing water in large bottles and boxes of Australian botanical soap are highlighted; the background reveals other shoppers in casual attire. Skincare sets including Strivectin serum and CNP ampoules are shown in close-up, followed by Hada Labo bottles and SU:M37 cream jars, each centered in the frame. (6) The focus shifts to bedding with white Hotel Grand comforters in plastic packaging and ergonomic pillows; the textures of the fabric are clearly visible. Floral printed duvet sets and animal-shaped triangular cushions in pink and grey are touched by a hand to demonstrate softness, while cooling mats and furry round cushions are stacked nearby. (7) Apparel items conclude the sequence, featuring wide-brimmed sun hats in various neutral colors and Nautica leather belts in white display boxes. Black Palladium boots and Puma athletic shoes are shown on their respective boxes, followed by black flip-flops and various quilted vests from New Balance and Hawke & Co laid out on tables. (8) Final items include stacks of embroidered kitchen towels in green and yellow patterns, followed by larger bath towels and plush rabbit-themed baby blanket sets. The video ends with a showcase of KitchenAid oven mitts, soft baby blankets, and luxury organic bedding sets, all filmed with a steady handheld camera in the warehouse environment.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair stands in a brightly lit retail environment, specifically the refrigerated seafood aisle of a Costco. She is wearing a cream-colored ribbed long-sleeve top and a black skirt. She holds a black plastic tray filled with neatly arranged orange salmon sashimi slices. Her facial expression is animated and surprised as she gestures toward the tray. Behind her, refrigerated display cases are filled with various packaged goods, and white tiled walls are visible. (2) The camera cuts to an extreme close-up of the salmon sashimi tray. The raw fish slices exhibit clear white fatty marbling and a glossy texture. A price label indicating '599' is briefly visible on a shelf in the background. A hand with pale nail polish points directly at the thick-cut pieces of salmon within the tray. (3) The shot returns to a medium shot of the woman in the store. She continues to talk enthusiastically, gesturing with her free hand. Another person's hand enters the frame from the left, pointing toward other salmon products on a lower shelf to provide a comparison. The lighting is bright and even studio-style. (4) The scene shifts to an indoor home setting, likely a dining or living area. Two women are seated at a wooden table. One is the previous woman in a maroon top, and the other is wearing a yellow and white striped shirt with a red bucket hat. They are using chopsticks to pick up salmon from a light blue fish-shaped ceramic plate. The background features household items and warm interior lighting. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the blue fish-shaped plate, which is now partially filled with the salmon sashimi slices. The fish looks fresh and moist. Various small condiment dishes containing soy sauce and wasabi are placed on the table nearby. (6) The camera captures the two women as they taste the food. The woman in the red hat is talking and gesturing emphatically with her hands, looking toward the other woman and the camera. The other woman is focused on eating, showing a satisfied facial expression. (7) An extreme close-up shows a single thick slice of salmon being held up by green plastic chopsticks. The marbling is very prominent. Colorful graphic text overlays appear around the slice to emphasize its thickness. (8) The final phase shows both women looking at the camera and smiling. They appear to be in the middle of a lively conversation about the food. One woman holds her chopsticks near her mouth while the other continues to gesture, concluding their review in the warm home environment.

The background features light-colored walls and a wooden shelf populated with several plush toys and a yellow cartoon character lamp under bright, even indoor lighting. (4) Both women present three distinct boxes of m2 collagen drinks in red, purple, and pink packaging. They point to the boxes on the table and hold up individual packets for the viewer to see. The framing is a medium shot, capturing their upper bodies and the items on the table clearly. (5) A close-up shot focuses on the red box and several matching packets laid out on a wooden surface. A hand pours a dark red liquid from one of the packets into a tall, narrow glass. The women reappear in the next shot, smiling and holding the glass while gesturing excitedly towards the camera. (6) The focus shifts to the purple 'Night' version of the product. Purple packets are displayed before the camera, and the liquid is poured into a glass in a similar close-up fashion. The women continue to speak and gesture towards their faces, indicating the product's effect on their skin while holding the purple sachets. (7) Finally, they introduce the pink 'Bright' version of the drink. Pink packets are shown on the table alongside the box. The video concludes with the two women holding all three boxes and several packets, waving and making 'V' hand signs towards the lens in a high-energy, cheerful manner.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 為什麼年齡增加的你們. [Variety]: 2023 VS 2025. 越老越漂亮? 反而比三年前的狀態更好了?. (2) [Subtitle]: 今年參加營養師課程後 發現吃進身體裏的東西真的很重要 人如其食! 每天吃的東西 都會反應在我們的臉和身體 以前一天一杯手搖杯 都不算多 現在每天最少要喝 三千毫升的水才夠 但是喝水還不夠 自從我們開始固定喝 狀態真的不一樣 以前覺得膠原飲 只是保養品的延伸 現在才知道 真的能吸收的膠原 才是關鍵 所以我們都選擇這個. (3) [Slogan]: m2美度 超能膠原飲. [Variety]: 真的能吸收的膠原 才是關鍵. (4) [Subtitle]: 紅色超能膠原飲 每天早上空腹喝一包 一包含6000mg 黃金比例膠原蛋白 喝起來酸酸甜甜的 紅石榴 完全沒有以前吃過 其他的膠原產品的可怕腥味 像果汁一樣 還有晚上就喝這款 紫色晚安膠原飲 除了經典韓國 雙胜肽膠原蛋白 配方 還搭配GABA等成分 洗澡前喝一包 身體內外都有 睡前儀式感 告訴自己的身體是時候 好好休息補充睡眠和營養 不論喝紅的或是紫的 我們都會先喝一包 粉色水光膠原飲 有點類似保養前 要先擦化妝水的概念 先幫皮膚補水 這樣讓後續的膠原 更好吸收 裡面有神經醯胺 韓國玻尿酸 能讓整個人透透亮亮的 獨立包裝 方便飲用 滿滿膠原力 讓你漂亮又美麗. (5) [Slogan]: 一包含6000mg 黃金比例膠原蛋白. 紫色晚安膠原飲. 雙胜肽膠原蛋白 還搭配GABA等成分. 睡前儀式感. 粉色水光膠原飲. 更好吸收. 讓你漂亮又美麗.

(3) A closer shot focuses on the details of the plushies. Hello Kitty is seen wearing a yellow and pink outfit, while Kuromi features a purple hood with a small grey eye mask accessory. The women's hands are visible as they point out these specific features. The background remains consistent with the retail store setting, showing other shoppers faintly in the distance. (4) The two women continue their high-energy presentation, laughing and gesturing broadly. Text overlays in Traditional Chinese appear on the screen to highlight the price and correct a verbal mistake made during the recording. audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy electronic synthesizer riff accompanied by a fast, driving 4/4 drum machine beat. A male narrator speaks in a rapid, excited tone, announcing the Costco discount event. A sharp 'whoosh' transition SFX marks the end of the intro and the start of the product list. (2) Each subsequent phase is defined by a rapid-fire sequence of spoken product names and prices. The narrator maintains an extremely high speech rate, barely pausing between items. Every visual cut is punctuated by a subtle 'click' or 'pop' sound effect in the background, matching the visual rhythm. (3) The background music remains constant throughout, providing a high-tempo, major-key foundation that keeps the energy levels peaked. The narrator's pitch fluctuates dramatically as he emphasizes discount amounts, using rising intonation to maintain audience interest. (4) Towards the end of the video, the narrator’s delivery becomes even more emphatic as he reads out the final alcohol and whiskey discounts. The music swells slightly in the mix, and the final phrase is followed by a sharp 'impact' SFX to signal the conclusion of the broadcast.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman stands in a Costco warehouse aisle, wearing a blue bucket hat and a denim-style blue dress over a white top. She holds a large yellow box featuring Pokemon characters. Bright warehouse lighting illuminates the scene, and large colorful text overlays are present. (2) The camera zooms into a close-up of the yellow product box, showcasing two Pokeball-shaped dispensers (red and blue) and a picture of Pikachu. The woman points at the characters on the box with an expressive face. (3) The product box is rotated to show the side and back panels, which contain detailed infographics, safety information, and instructions in Traditional Chinese, along with a cartoon of Jigglypuff. (4) A tight close-up focuses on the internal packaging, revealing the two physical pump-style toothpaste containers shaped like Pokéballs nestled inside the box. (5) The camera pans to a nearby shelf displaying bulk packs of Pokemon-themed toothbrushes. The woman holds up one of the multi-packs, pointing out the different character designs on each toothbrush handle. (6) A final close-up shows the variety of characters like Charmander, Squirtle, and Pikachu printed on the toothbrush packaging as the woman continues to gesture enthusiastically towards the camera.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit warehouse store, Costco. A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a white knit top over a black dress, stands before a refrigerated display case. She looks at the camera with a smile, gesturing towards several stacked purple boxes of Hershey's Choco Lava Bao Buns. Behind her, other shoppers in casual attire move through the spacious aisles under high industrial ceilings. A large red and blue Costco logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The camera zooms in slightly as the woman picks up a box, holding it close to the camera to show the packaging details. She uses her right index finger to point at the price tag and the piece count on the box. Yellow variety-show style text overlays appear, flashing product names. Her facial expressions are expressive, switching between excitement and focused narration. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a retail environment. (3) The scene cuts to an indoor home setting. The woman is joined by another woman wearing a yellow striped shirt and a red bucket hat. They sit at a grey stone table with a red heart-shaped plate containing two dark brown buns. They pick up the buns and tear them open with their hands, examining the chocolate interior. The background features a wooden floor and a shelf filled with plush toys, illuminated by warm indoor lighting. (4) The two women engage in a taste test, taking bites and nodding while speaking to the camera. The woman in the red hat uses a small tool at one point. More colorful text overlays like bread texture descriptions and reaction phrases appear in the lower half of the frame. The camera remains static at an eye-level medium shot, focusing on their reactions and the physical texture of the food being broken apart.

The vocal delivery is fast-paced and enunciated clearly, with a rising intonation typical of vlogs. The BGM remains constant, maintaining a bright and commercial atmosphere without interference. (3) A second female voice enters the dialogue in an indoor setting. The two voices interact casually, while the BGM continues to provide a consistent rhythmic floor. A rhythmic 'chime' SFX occurs as they discuss the food texture. The room tone is neutral, and the signal-to-noise ratio remains excellent. (4) The narrator’s tone shifts to a slightly critical yet humorous tone regarding the food's filling. A 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes a dramatic visual cue. The music and vocals overlap continuously until the end of the clip, maintaining a high-energy production style with professional clarity and balanced mastering.

She holds two large, cylindrical decorative tins shaped like nutcrackers. The background is filled with yellow product boxes on metal industrial shelves. (2) Close-up shot of several nutcracker-themed tins arranged on a retail shelf. One tin is shaped like a mouse king with a purple coat and white face, and others are traditional soldier nutcrackers. A yellow price tag is visible on the shelf edge. (3) The woman is seen again, now holding three tins in her arms, showing them to the camera. She smiles and speaks directly to the lens, moving the tins slightly to show different angles. (4) Close-up focus on the lids of the tins. The mouse king has a rounded, dome-shaped lid, while the soldier nutcrackers have flat lids. The textures of the printed metal are visible. (5) The woman continues to hold the tins, gesturing toward them with her free hand. She appears to be laughing and reacting to someone off-camera. A person walks briefly in the far background aisle. (6) A hand enters the frame from the right side and gives a thumbs-up gesture in front of the nutcracker tins held by the woman.

(5) Each new phase is triggered by a transition sound effect as the speaker lists dozens of products—including food, household goods, and health supplements—without losing vocal intensity or energy. (6) The video concludes with the BGM sustaining its energetic loop as the narrator finishes the final product listing, ending with a cheerful, rising intonation. No ambient floor or background chatter is heard, indicating a post-produced studio recording.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) A high-pitched, energetic female voice speaks quickly in Mandarin, announcing that a previously sold-out item is finally back in stock. Background music consists of a high-tempo, upbeat electronic pop track with a strong, rhythmic beat. The acoustic environment sounds like a large, open indoor space with a slight reverb, but the voice remains clear and centered in the mix. (2) A second female voice, also with a high pitch but slightly softer tone, chimes in to express excitement about the colors available. The two voices overlap briefly in a friendly, conversational manner. The BGM maintains a steady energy level, providing a cheerful bed for the dialogue. There are no significant sound effects or background noises, suggesting a relatively quiet recording environment or effective noise suppression. (3) The primary female speaker continues by describing the specific colors and recommending the green and blue ones as rare finds. Her speech rate is brisk and enthusiastic, with frequent upward inflections. The BGM continues with its bright, synthesized melody and consistent percussion. The overall volume of the music is well-balanced, sitting just below the vocals. (4) The speaker mentions the price of 359 dollars and describes the blankets as being for two people. Her voice carries a persuasive and encouraging tone. The music builds slightly in energy as she delivers the final call to action, warning viewers to hurry before they sell out again. The track ends with a clean cut as the voices finish speaking.

It highlights the availability of four different colors, offers styling recommendations, provides specific pricing, and creates urgency by mentioning the likelihood of selling out again.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of brand logo, specific pricing information, and verbal recommendation to purchase the product at a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Social media style 'finds' video targeting bargain hunters and fans of the Peanuts franchise.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women stand in a parking lot at night in front of a brightly lit Costco Wholesale sign. One woman wears a black beret, a white furry jacket, and a beige skirt, while the other wears a blue beret, a bright yellow puffer jacket, and holds a small white Maltese dog. The lighting is harsh artificial light from the store's signage and street lamps. (2) The scene transitions to a brightly lit modern indoor home kitchen and laundry area. A woman wearing a black vest over a purple blouse proudly displays three large white plastic bottles of Lysol Laundry Sanitizer to the lens. The background shows a neutral-toned living room with a brown leather sofa and a television. (3) A rapid sequence shows a woman in a blue dress lying prone on a light-colored carpet in a living room area packed with various children's toys and a small wire pet cage. The camera then cuts to a close-up of a hand pouring blue laundry sanitizer into the designated detergent tray of a white washing machine. (4) At a marble kitchen countertop, a woman in a blue knit sweater introduces food items. She holds a blue carton of Koh pure coconut water and a large glass jar of Moccona instant coffee. She demonstrates pouring the coconut water into a glass, followed by dark coffee mixed with milk to create a layered drink. (5) Both women appear together at the kitchen table holding yellow boxes of Weider Ocular Lutein supplements. A macro close-up reveals a stream of fine pinkish powder being emptied from a gold packet onto a translucent blue glass dish. They both consume the supplement directly from the packets, smiling. (6) The women are shown in various settings using digital devices: one woman works at a computer desk with two monitors and a mechanical keyboard, while another sits on a sofa looking at a smartphone. The final scene features them posing with peace signs against a vibrant, saturated digital background depicting a traditional Asian city with red lanterns and fireworks.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-energy, fast-tempo electronic pop BGM featuring prominent synthesized drums and a bright melodic synth line. A female voice with a high-pitched, enthusiastic tone and clear articulation provides energetic narration. A distinct 'Whoosh' SFX occurs as the scene transitions from the exterior to the interior. (2) The background music maintains a consistent 128 BPM drive with a heavy kick drum pulse. A 'Pop' or bubble-like sound effect is heard when graphical elements appear on screen. The narrator's speech rate is high-density, conveying a sense of excitement and urgency in the product recommendations. (3) Incidental sounds of liquid pouring into a glass and the light clinking of a metal spoon against glass are clearly audible above the music bed. The BGM remains in a bright major tonality. A high-pitched 'Ding' sound effect emphasizes the price and product details displayed in the graphics. (4) The final phase features a 'Sparkle' jingle and several light 'Stinger' transition sound effects as the scene shifts between the office and reading environments. The narration concludes with a warm, high-arousal valence, and the music swells before a clean fade-out. The overall signal-to-noise ratio is high, with studio-quality vocal clarity.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote specific high-value household products and supplements available at Costco's online store by demonstrating their practical usage and health benefits in a high-energy, vlog-style format.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed explanation of supplement benefits, close-ups of product packaging, and call-to-action on product variety.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video utilizes social-media-native editing techniques, such as high-density text overlays and rapid transitions, to maintain engagement while promoting multiple commercial brands.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a graphic title card featuring the Costco logo and text about weekly specials from 11/17 to 11/23. The background shows a brightly lit warehouse interior with shoppers and carts moving through aisles. (2) A montage begins, showing close-ups of various grocery items on warehouse shelves. First, packages of pork meat are shown in a refrigerated section, followed by stacked cans of milk powder. (3) The camera focuses on boxes of beef soup and plastic-wrapped containers of tiramisu dessert. The lighting is consistently bright and even across the warehouse shelves. (4) A rapid sequence follows, showcasing snacks like Cadina and Milka, gum, and biscuits. Each product is presented in its retail packaging, often in bulk stacks. (5) The video continues through a wide variety of items: jellies, granola bars, nuts, and crackers. Each shot is a steady close-up or medium shot of the product display. (6) Dairy products like yogurt and beverages like grape juice and coffee are shown in their respective sections. (7) Household items like shampoo, shower gel, and cleaning powder appear toward the end, followed by bottles of white wine, maintaining the same high-speed montage style.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic BGM with a consistent 4/4 beat starts immediately. A male narrator introduces the Costco specials with a high-arousal, energetic, and professional tone. (2) The narrator begins a high-density delivery, listing product names and their specific price discounts. His speech rate is fast and rhythmic, perfectly matching the visual pace of the product montage. (3) The BGM provides a continuous melodic backdrop with bright synthesizer textures, maintaining an optimistic and urgent commercial vibe. (4) Each product announcement is punctuated by a slight vocal emphasis, with no significant ambient noise or incidental sounds, resulting in a very clean studio-mixed master track. (5) The narration continues uninterrupted until the end, providing a comprehensive verbal list of over 40 discounted items.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Product Showcase Montage -> Outro
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase a comprehensive list of weekly discounted products at Costco Taiwan for the late November period, encouraging viewers to visit the store and take advantage of sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video is a direct promotional list of Costco's weekly specials with prices and brand logos prominently displayed.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Extremely high information density video designed for rapid social media consumption. The high-speed editing and constant narration effectively convey a large volume of sales data in a short timeframe.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse interior. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown quilted winter jacket with a fur-trimmed hood, stands prominently in the center-left. She holds a large, transparent plastic bag containing four long, multi-grain baguettes crusted with seeds. Above her, a large digital overlay displays the red and blue 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo. A bold yellow and red variety text '回來了' appears at the center. The background features open refrigerated food cases, white tile flooring, and distant shelves filled with bulk goods. (2) The camera maintains a medium shot as the woman presents the bread closer to the viewer. A decorative text box appears on the left detailing the product name and price in Traditional Chinese. She gestures toward the bag and gives a thumbs-up with her right hand. An off-screen hand enters the frame from the lower right corner, pointing directly at the texture of the bread through the plastic wrap. The lighting is uniform, high-key industrial lighting characteristic of a large retail store. (3) The woman smiles broadly while shifting the bread bag slightly to show the bottom. A new graphic featuring a yellow megaphone icon and the text '滿滿的健康' appears on screen. The background remains the same warehouse setting, with price tags and other bakery items visible in the soft-focus distance. She maintains direct eye contact with the camera, exhibiting an inviting and persuasive facial expression. The visual rhythm is fast-paced with quick straight cuts between these subtle presentation shifts.

(3) [Subtitle]: 超好吃 然後上次我們拍影片介紹完 竟然停工了好一陣子. (4) [Subtitle]: 這個超棒 冬天有沒有必買 配濃湯什麼都好吃. (5) [Subtitle]: 配醬也超讚 然後最重要是滿滿的高纖穀粒. (6) [Variety]: 滿滿的健康. [Subtitle]: 你吃得到滿滿的健康 我覺得這個很值得買. (7) [Subtitle]: 價格超划算 趕快哦現在又進了 趁這一波他剩一點點很值得.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-arousal male narrator speaking rapidly in Mandarin, delivering an enthusiastic announcement. He uses a bright, professional tone with significant pitch variability to capture attention. Simultaneously, an upbeat, rhythmic electronic pop BGM starts with a strong 4/4 synthetic kick drum and bright synth melodies. A subtle 'whoosh' sound effect emphasizes the first visual graphic transition. (2) As the narrator lists the price and product name, his vocal intensity remains high and projected. The music maintains a steady tempo of approximately 124 BPM, providing an energetic backdrop. Subtle rustling sounds from plastic packaging are audible beneath the voice, suggesting physical handling. A light 'pop' SFX is heard as a new text overlay appears on screen. (3) The narration continues at a fast pace, urging consumers to act quickly. The BGM remains constant in volume and texture, exhibiting a positive major-mode tonality. The acoustic spectrum is dominated by the high-frequency clarity of the voice and the percussive elements of the music. The recording ends with the voice concluding its persuasive pitch and a brief instrumental tail of the BGM.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women walk briskly through a brightly lit, modern airport terminal, pulling large, heavy suitcases. One wears a white blouse, the other a black top. The background shows terminal signs and pillars. (2) The scene shifts outdoors to a white van parked near a sidewalk. A staff member in a grey shirt is seen from the back, lifting suitcases into the vehicle's open rear. The lighting is natural daylight. (3) A close-up reveals the van's spacious interior, packed with four large suitcases of varying colors and patterns. The focus is on a light blue suitcase with a cartoon bee. (4) One woman stands before a car rental storefront with green and red signage. The camera then cuts to a bustling gas station with a large "COSMO" logo under a clear blue sky. (5) A screen recording shows a website interface for booking cars, with fields for dates and car types. Graphic text overlays highlight the simplicity of the process. (6) Inside the office, a close-up shows a paper with multiple QR codes for messaging apps. Next, the women are at a wooden counter, signing rental agreements with a staff member. (7) Back in the car, the women demonstrate the interior space, smiling and gesturing at the seats. The camera captures the plush black upholstery and modern dashboard features. (8) A fast-paced montage depicts various Hokkaido landmarks: vibrant fireworks at night, a serene lake at sunset, lush green mountain trails, and colorful flower fields under a bright sun. (9) The women return to the airport van area, waving at the camera. A final static screen displays several colorful promotional coupons with discount amounts listed in Japanese Yen.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens in a brightly lit Costco warehouse. A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown utility-style jacket and a plaid skirt, stands in the aisle holding a large green dinosaur toy box. Behind her, shelves are stocked with products like Play-Doh, and several other shoppers are visible in the background moving through the aisles. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo is superimposed at the top of the frame. (2) The camera zooms in for a medium close-up as the woman points to the 'Big Dinosaur Family' toy. The toy features a large green T-Rex with a transparent belly containing 28 smaller dinosaur figurines. The woman touches the dinosaur's snout and teeth, demonstrating its physical appearance. The industrial warehouse lighting remains consistent, highlighting the colorful packaging. (3) The perspective shifts to the back and side of the box. The woman points at a 'Product List' chart showing different dinosaur species and instructional graphics that detail how to assemble the tail and activate sound features. She mimics the action of pressing the dinosaur's arm to open its belly. The scene concludes with her holding the box toward the camera, smiling warmly.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-tempo, upbeat electronic dance music begins immediately with a consistent percussive beat. A male narrator begins speaking very rapidly in Mandarin Chinese, his voice sounding highly energized and clear. He introduces the Costco weekly discount report with high vocal arousal and bright intonation. (2) As the music maintains its driving rhythm, the narrator's speech rate increases to a frantic pace. He starts listing items like tissues and chicken thighs, mentioning the original and discounted prices for each with virtually no pauses between words. (3) The rhythmic pattern continues without interruption. The narrator calls out a long sequence of snack and grocery brands, his tone remaining enthusiastic and loud, well-balanced above the synthesized background track. (4) The marathon-like delivery of product names and prices continues through the middle of the video. The electronic beat is steady and prominent, providing a sense of urgency that matches the rapid-fire vocal delivery. (5) As the list reaches chilled goods and finally alcoholic beverages, the narrator's energy remains peaked. He finishes the list with the same high-intensity pitch variability before the track stops abruptly, concluding the information-dense broadcast.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Intro -> Sequence of discounted products -> Ending
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a rapid-fire information bulletin to inform Costco Taiwan members about specific sales and discounts available for the week of December 8-14, 2023. By using a fast-paced 'shopping list' format, it maximizes the amount of product information shared in a short time to entice shoppers to visit.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Detailed pricing, discount information, and clear focus on brand-name products within a specific retailer.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video exemplifies the 'information overload' style of short-form social media marketing, relying on extreme speech speed and rapid cuts to maintain engagement.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair in pigtails, wearing a red bucket hat and a white long-sleeved shirt over a black fuzzy vest, stands in a brightly lit warehouse aisle. She holds two large red-and-white cans of soup, smiling broadly at the camera with high energy. In the background, floor-to-ceiling shelves are packed with consumer goods, specifically canned food items. (2) The camera zooms in slightly as she holds the cans closer to the lens. Her hands move excitedly, and she wears a red heart-shaped ring. The background continues to show stacks of products. (3) She gestures toward a price tag hanging from the shelf above her, pointing with her index finger. Her facial expression remains very animated with a wide grin. (4) She holds the cans out to her sides and gives a thumbs-up gesture. The lighting is uniform and bright throughout the scene.

The background consists of tall glass-fronted freezer cases filled with various products. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail environment. (2) The camera zooms into the interior of a freezer. Multiple green bags of 'Veggie Maria' brand frozen green asparagus are stacked neatly on shelves. A white price tag displays the number '$319' in large black text. The packaging is vibrant green and white. (3) The shot cuts back to the woman in the aisle. She points toward the freezer case while holding a yellow container in her left hand. Her facial expression is expressive and animated, showing excitement. In the background, other shoppers are visible as blurred figures moving through the brightly lit warehouse space. (4) Close-up on the woman's face as she explains the product. She has clear skin and wears subtle makeup. Her movements are energetic, involving frequent hand-waving and shifting of her weight. The camera is handheld, resulting in slight, natural movement. (5) Another cut to the frozen asparagus shelves, specifically highlighting the price tag and the arrangement of the green bags. (6) The woman returns to the frame, continuing her presentation. She gives a thumbs-up gesture and later brushes her hair behind her ear. As the video nears its end, she waves goodbye to the camera while smiling warmly. The environment remains consistent with the warehouse supermarket setting.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The scene opens in a brightly lit warehouse store setting, featuring a large red and blue logo of Costco Wholesale at the top of the frame. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and a dark vest, stands prominently in front of several stacked boxes containing Snoopy-themed rugs. She holds up a colorful rug featuring Snoopy and Woodstock on a red roof, smiling cheerfully at the camera with a friendly expression. (2) The camera transitions to a medium close-up focusing on the physical texture and details of the rug. A hand reaches into the frame to stroke the thick, coarse pile of the rug, specifically moving across the white Snoopy figure and the blue sky background. The lighting is bright and even, highlighting the vibrant primary colors of the material. In the background, blurred retail shelves and warehouse ceilings are visible, establishing a commercial environment. (3) The woman presents several different design variations of the rugs, flipping them over to show the grey non-slip backing material. She holds a yellow rug with Snoopy hugging Woodstock amidst flowers, followed by a dark blue rug featuring a collage of Peanuts characters' faces. Her hand gestures emphasize the size and thickness of the mats, while her facial expressions remain animated and engaging throughout the product demonstration. (4) The final sequence shows the woman holding a long, horizontal three-panel rug featuring different Snoopy poses against green, yellow, and purple backgrounds. She continues to speak directly to the viewer, standing between aisles of product-filled pallets. Her voice is clear and well-enunciated, showing high pitch variability as she describes the product. The background music maintains its energetic rhythm, providing a constant melodic bed. There is minimal ambient interference, although a very faint, low-frequency room tone typical of a large indoor warehouse can be perceived beneath the primary speech and music. The vocal intensity remains high and projected throughout. The music track's harmonic tension is relatively low, consisting of a repetitive, catchy chord loop. (4) As the video nears its end, the female narrator maintains her enthusiastic prosody without any significant pauses, asking the audience for their opinion. The music continues at its full energy level without interruption or fading. A final "pop" sound effect is heard as the audio track ends abruptly, matching the quick editing style. A young woman with long black hair, dressed in a blue and white long-sleeved top and a black skirt, stands in an aisle filled with orange industrial shelving. She is gesturing towards two Thermos flasks displayed on a lower shelf. Behind her, boxes of Thermos products are neatly stacked. One flask is matte black with a dark brown lid, and the other is off-white with a pale green lid and an orange retractable handle. She holds them up for the camera to see clearly, her facial expressions showing excitement and interest. Her hands are actively moving as she discusses the products in a medium shot. (3) A detailed close-up of the off-white flask is shown. The woman demonstrates how the lid unscrews to become a cup and how the inner stopper works. The focus is sharp on the product, showing the texture and the golden THERMOS branding. The background is slightly blurred but still clearly shows the warehouse environment and other shoppers in the distance. (4) The woman demonstrates a unique feature of the flask: a retractable handle. She pulls the orange handle out, then pushes it back until it lies flush against the flask's body. She repeats this action to emphasize the space-saving benefit. Her movements are deliberate and well-framed, showcasing the mechanical design of the item while she looks directly at the camera. (5) The final phase shows the woman standing by the shelf again, holding both flasks near a price card. She gestures toward a price card that reads $1,139. She smiles and makes expressive hand movements, indicating a strong recommendation. The scene concludes with her holding the black flask close to the camera, emphasizing its sleek finish and contrasting color palette.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-energy female voice speaking Mandarin with an enthusiastic, high-pitched tone and fast delivery. Simultaneously, a bright, upbeat electronic pop background music track begins. The music has a clear, rhythmic beat with a tempo of approximately 120 BPM and major-mode tonality. (2) A distinct mechanical 'click' and 'snap' sound is heard as the woman manipulates the plastic parts of the flask. These sound effects are sharp and have a short spectral duration. The BGM remains consistent in volume, acting as a supportive bed beneath the narration. The speaker's arousal level is high. (3) As she describes the lid's function, there is a soft, friction-based sound of unscrewing plastic followed by a gentle 'thud' as parts are set down. The music continues with a steady pulse, featuring synthesized percussion and light electronic melodies. The ambient store noise is extremely faint. (4) During the demonstration of the retractable handle, multiple rhythmic 'click-clack' sounds are audible, perfectly synchronized with the visual movement of the handle. These sounds are crisp, indicating high-quality sound design for emphasis. The speaker's voice maintains a friendly and persuasive tone with high articulation clarity. (5) The video concludes with the speaker's voice reaching a final peak in intensity as she provides the price and recommendation. The music reaches a natural cadence and fades out quickly. The signal-to-noise ratio is excellent, with the voice and intentional SFX clearly dominating the acoustic landscape throughout.

(3) The pattern continues with the narrator speaking continuously over the driving BGM, listing each product and its corresponding discount price in a rhythmic fashion that mirrors the fast visual cuts. visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins with a medium shot of a woman with long dark hair, wearing a brown puffer jacket and a checkered skirt, standing in a Costco warehouse. She is holding a portable stainless steel heater and its box in front of a massive stack of pink 'Kairo' hand warmer boxes. A large 'Costco Wholesale' logo is overlaid at the top. She looks at the heater while adjusting its position for the camera. (2) The camera moves closer to the product as she points to the heater's front grill. She then turns the product slightly to show a side circular opening where a gas canister would be inserted. Her hands are active, demonstrating the size and features. The lighting is bright and industrial, typical of a warehouse store. (3) A cut shifts the focus to a stack of 'Kairo' hand warmer boxes, with a price tag of $349 visible in the background. A finger points towards the boxes, comparing the mass-market warming product to the expensive portable heater. (4) The woman is shown again in a medium shot, leaning against a shelf. She laughs and gestures with her hands as she speaks. In the background, various household electronics and kitchen appliances are visible on the shelves under the bright studio-like store lights. (5) The final phase shows her smiling and looking directly at the camera, leaning one arm on the stack of boxes. Her expression is lighthearted and dismissive, emphasizing her point about the product's practicality in the local climate.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two young Asian women sit at a table in a bright indoor restaurant. The woman on the left wears a black mesh top over a white lace garment, and the woman on the right wears a black top with a choker. They smile enthusiastically at the camera. Large text overlays appear at the top. (2) A brief shot of the restaurant interior reveals workers in yellow shirts moving between white tables and red-accented service areas. (3) The camera focuses back on the two women as they gesture toward two large metal bowls of soup and two smaller bowls of rice on the table. (4) Close-up shots alternate between the women's faces reacting with excitement and the food items. They use spoons to stir and lift ingredients from the bowls. (5) An insert shot shows a close-up of a bowl of braised pork rice topped with generous portions of meat, with a starburst graphic overlay. (6) Another insert shot shows the clear broth of the beef soup being stirred, revealing slices of apple floating within the liquid. (7) The women are shown tasting the food, with the woman on the left taking a large bite of beef and displaying a look of pure satisfaction and surprise. (8) Detailed close-up shots of individual beef slices on a spoon demonstrate the texture and thinness of the meat. (9) The video concludes with both women gesturing towards the food and smiling at the camera, summarizing their experience in the same restaurant setting.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a grey top and a black-and-white checkered skirt, stands in the aisle of a Costco warehouse. She holds a large pink gift box featuring Godiva and Labubu branding. The background is filled with stacks of similar pink boxes and warehouse shelving under bright industrial lighting. (2) The camera zooms in on a price tag above the products, displaying $899. (3) Back to the woman, she gestures excitedly toward the box, pointing at the three distinct decorative tins visible through the window of the packaging. (4) Scene transitions to an indoor home setting. Three metal tins (gold, dark brown, and light pink) are placed on a table alongside several individually wrapped chocolates and decorative cards. (5) Two women are now seated at the table. One is the original woman from Costco, and the other is wearing a white hat and a brown vest. visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse environment with high industrial ceilings, large metal storage racks filled with bulk products, refrigerated glass displays, and shoppers with red carts on a concrete floor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio track opens with a high-arousal male narrator introducing a 'Weekly Special Report' for Costco. His speech is very fast and enthusiastic, exhibiting a high pitch variability and a cheerful tone. An upbeat, electronic pop BGM with a strong, driving 4/4 beat starts immediately. Ambient warehouse noise is barely audible. (2) The narrator begins a hyper-dense list of products and prices. His delivery is articulated clearly with a rapid speech rate, syncopated slightly with the BGM. Each product name and its discounted price is spoken with an upward inflection to maintain energy. The music remains continuous and rhythmic. (3) The rhythmic listing continues at a steady pace. Very faint incidental noises, likely from rustling packaging or distant cart wheels, are occasionally heard but stay well below the mastered signal of the voice and BGM. The speaker's energy level remains consistently high without any strategic silences. (4) As the video nears its end, the narration maintains its rapid pace, covering beverages and snacks. The BGM reaches a crescendo in its electronic texture. The speaker concludes the promotional list with high confidence and positive emotional valence. The audio cut is sharp at the final frame of the Budweiser cases.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Evidence -> Evidence -> Evidence
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a high-speed promotional catalog for Costco Wholesale, designed to quickly inform viewers of the current week's best discounts and deals. By using a rapid-fire montage of popular household items and groceries combined with energetic narration, it aims to create a sense of urgency and excitement, encouraging shoppers to visit the store immediately to take advantage of the limited-time offers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly uses the Costco logo and showcases specific products with price-reduction graphics to promote shopping at the store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly efficient promotional short-form video that utilizes high-density information and rapid editing to capture consumer interest in warehouse deals.

The lighting is bright and focused on the food texture. (5) The women taste the pastries, showing joyful facial expressions and nodding. Confetti and star graphics appear around them. (6) A sequence of close-ups shows the lemon-shaped pastry and premium packaging, including a green shopping bag. The woman in the hat is later seen on a brown leather couch, eating while a small white dog sits beside her. (7) The women present a new product: a large lemon cream tart in a pink 'MIMIAN' box. The woman on the left holds a smartphone showing a website. They give thumbs-up gestures to the camera.

(4) A quick insert shot shows the woman's finger pointing at the price label on the salad box, showing the numerical price and barcode. (5) A panning shot displays rows of refrigerated food items on shelves, including other salads and prepared meals, inside the warehouse store. (6) The scene transitions to an indoor home setting. The original woman is joined by another woman wearing a patterned bucket hat. They sit at a white table with the salad plated on a red decorative dish. Stuffed toys are visible in the background. (7) Close-up shots follow, showing metal tongs lifting a thick slice of smoked salmon to emphasize its size and texture. Both women show high energy and expressive facial movements while discussing the food. (8) Detailed close-ups show the salad being tossed, highlighting the onions and dressing coating the ingredients.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two women, one in a purple top and one in a hat and black top, stand in an outdoor parking lot in front of a large grey industrial building with a Costco logo. They are talking excitedly to the camera. (2) The scene shifts to inside a retail store aisle where the women hold a large pink and white box for a Philips Wet & Dry Epilator, pointing to promotional text overlays. (3) They transition to a well-lit indoor living room setting, sitting at a table with the product and several white plastic attachments laid out. They hold the device and gesture toward its features. (4) Close-up shots show the epilator head spinning, various nozzle attachments being held up to the camera, and text explaining the 3cm wide head. (5) Demonstrations occur: the device is used on a chin, a finger, and a leg. A male character's sideburn is briefly shown being trimmed by the device. (6) In a white-tiled bathroom, the woman with the hat uses the device on her leg while showering, demonstrating the waterproof functionality and the exfoliation brush attachment. (7) Comparison shots show two legs side-by-side with labels indicating 'Hair Removed' vs 'No Hair Removed,' highlighting the whitening effect. (8) The women return to the indoor studio setting, holding the device and giving a thumbs up to conclude the review.

visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long, straight dark hair, dressed in a navy blue off-the-shoulder ruffled top, blue denim jeans, and a dark blue beret, is seen from behind walking through a wide Costco aisle. She is walking away from the camera toward the center of the warehouse. She looks back over her shoulder with a joyful, excited expression, her eyes wide and mouth open in a smile. The aisle is flanked by high shelves stacked with numerous yellow and green boxes of snack crackers. The floor is polished gray concrete, and the lighting is bright, cool-toned industrial warehouse lighting. (2) The woman stands in front of a massive vertical stack of blue "Guai Guai" snack boxes. She points enthusiastically at the cartoon character on the box, which features a blue-haired character with a big toothy grin. She gestures with both hands, her face animated as she speaks directly toward the camera. In the background, other shoppers are visible as small, blurred figures further down the aisle. A large "COSTCO WHOLESALE" logo is superimposed on the top of the frame. (3) The scene cuts to a price tag close-up on the shelf, displaying "$ 289" in large black font. The woman then appears again, holding a single large blue box with both hands, showing the size and weight relative to her body. She smiles broadly, looking into the lens. The background consists of rows of large warehouse shelving units. (4) The environment shifts to a cozy indoor living room setting with warm, soft lighting. Two women are sitting side-by-side at a white table. The main woman from the previous scene (still in the beret) and a friend with long dark hair in a purple top are unboxing individual green and blue snack bags.
